reviews.text:
A Trusted Legal Advisor Beyond Compare.

Upon first meeting Jacqueline Porter at a networking event, I immediately took note that something that set her apart was her graceful refusal to simply tell people what they want to hear. Instead, she provided advice that was honest, straightforward, and rooted in her impressively deep understanding of the legal landscape. This refreshing approach might not always be what people are hoping for, but it's exactly what they need (speaking from experience). Knowing that she is not one to ever sugarcoat things has given me immense confidence in her guidance, so much so that she has become one of my most trusted resources.

It's evident that Jacqueline doesn't just view her work as a job but as a calling. I've come to trust Jacqueline's advice implicitly, knowing that she always has the best interests of her clients and the situation at heart.

What's truly remarkable is that Jacqueline's expertise goes beyond her own practice areas. Her recommendations for potential attorneys covering legal matters outside of her scope have been nothing short of spot-on. She has an unparalleled ability to assess a situation and connect you with the right professionals to help.

Honestly, I'm not just writing this review as a mere recommendation – I'm writing it as a heartfelt endorsement. Jacqueline is someone I'm honored to know and recommend. If you're looking for counsel who won't just tell you what you want to hear or a family mediator who is protective of a fair and just path toward resolution for all parties, I have all trust and belief that Jacqueline will guide you with integrity and unwavering dedication to a fair process. No matter how complex your needs are, don’t miss the opportunity to hire Jacqueline Porter.
They advertise services they do not actually provide. My recommendation would be to use a firm that doesn't lie to you before they've even met you.

A family member used this law practice- took over two years to close a very straightforward, simple will. The bill included charges for ‘case review’ - was this because the law firm hadn’t touched the case in over nine months? When my family member called about the status, she was was told she was interfering with the paralegal’s work and that it would take longer and she would have to pay for the phone call. I cannot in good conscience recommend this law practice.

Me and my fiancée were in India and stuck  with a situation of title transfer . Attorney Spencer Stromberg and Kelsey Rychalski have been super awesome, approachable  and very patient in answering our questions & thorough. The firm is very reliable, professional and rightly priced. We are lucky to have come across this firm and  attorney spencer . Anyone who needs a attorney representation need not look further.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad we were able to help and we enjoyed working with you.

reviews.text: Our attorney, Brett Sullivan, helped us win our property legal issues at our primary residence. By diligent review of Brett he found that the easement that was our legal issue, was not correctly created from day one. Our timing was difficult, but do realize we were having to work through this during Covid. We are greatly thankful that Brett Sullivan won our case, eliminating the easement. Thank you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Holly, we appreciate you leaving us a review and sharing your experience with the community. It was a pleasure working with you on this matter. Our client's success is of the highest importance to us, and we are thrilled we could bring you a positive outcome. Thank you!

reviews.text: I've closed at least 6 transactions with Lucent Law since January and while not all have been easy files, their staff has made the inherent burden and tumultuous behavior that is synonymous with real-estate deals appear to be smooth and easy. Thank you so much for identifying issues before they become problematic, your communication, guidance and always remaining professional.

The best closers ever! Their competition doesn't even come close. We do a ton of work with them because they are excellent at what they do. They are so smart and make every real estate transaction as easy as possible.
Melissa and Diane at the Northside office are FANTASTIC! Best closing office in Spokane hands down! Love you ladies!

Jenean recently represented my as a defendant in a real estate case and I could not be more impressed!  We won our case due to her diligent and detailed attention throughout the process.  I would definitely recommend Brett, Janean and their talented staff with any real estate needs!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your delightful review, Corey! It was a pleasure to assist you. We appreciate our clients.

reviews.text: Brett Sullivan helped us out tremendously! I was skeptical about calling a lawyer after an issue with the recent purchase of our home & he was very knowledgeable & helpful!

When a horrible car accident tragically happened to my family Doug tirelessly and professionally represented my interests.  Things looked dire after the accident.  The medical bills and complicated mix of car insurance and health insurance overwhelmed me, Doug was there to help.  He knowledgeably navigated a world I did not understand and with a successful outcome that did not bankrupt me and my family.  When I was in one of the toughest spots of my life Doug's kindness reassured me and his vast knowledge from years of work resulted in a positive outcome for myself and my family.  I would hire him again in a second.

Doug helped my wife and I with a harassment and violation of our quiet enjoyment on our property matter by our neighbor.
His very effective letter was thorough and to the point, which rapidly stopped the harassment.
Doug was very professional, patient, and positive, he went above and beyond, I would recommend Doug for all your legal needs.

Mr. Spruance represented me on a difficult contract negotiation for my video business involving some tough negotiations with multiple attorneys who were not being very forthright. He was able to renegotiate a lot of the bad parts of the contract so they were more fair and allowed me to get paid what I was owed on time. My customers ended up very happy with my work under the contract and they have sent me a lot more video recording and editing business.
On another case he successfully sued someone who took my video work and did not pay me for it. The judge obviously knew Mr.Spruance and he was impressed with Doug’s argument in court.
Both cases were not very profitable for Doug, but he promised to do the work, and he kept his word.
Because of this I referred Mr. Spruance a friend who was involved in a very bad accident, and Doug got an outstanding recovery for of the client in this catastrophic injury situation.
Mr. Spruance won the Public Justice Award from the Washington State Association for Justice in 2011. It is awarded to one attorney in the state of Washington per year and I understand it is quite an honor.
I believe anyone who gets Mr. Spruance as their lawyer is frankly lucky to get him. He is very experienced, and I believe he works extremely hard for good results.
All that I have to say is Keith Douglas was a waste of my money & a waste of my time. This attorney & his assistant Adele are 2 very lazy people.

23 years ago this crook Keith Douglas agreed to do my medical negligence case with resulted in a still born baby. He took my $500 dollars, then a month later he sent me a letter explaining he could do nothing and kept my money! He lied and said there was a case, but then when it came down to doing it he just took my money and said there wasn't a case. I can't believe this crooked man is still practicing law.
Good friends
The absolute best !

By far, hands down the best attorney I have ever seen in action on our case. He is tough, quick to get things done,  very responsive,  and is known in the area as being someone other attorneys don't want to go up against. You absolutely get what you pay for and then some! We highly recommend him for your own civil and criminal needs.
Update: Still working hard for us. Since we hired him I have come to know him a little better. I appreciate how sneaky, and how skilled, he is at timing.  He has been extremely patient working our case and having to keep our family calm through the ups and downs of family law. He knows "things" that keep our case ahead of the opposition.  5+ STARS! I'd give him more if there were more to click. I'll be back with final update in about a month.
Final Update: Our time with Craig is coming to a close,  and a new chapter of the saga continues in a new county. I stand by what I originally stated. This man is kind, patient with people with disabilities, and firmly understanding. He has held back 3 attorneys in 2 years, and kept our case ahead of the game. He is knowledgeable in family law cases, works beyond what any other attorney would consider doing. The retaining fee is a drop in the bucket compared to the amount of time he puts into a case. In the past few weeks I have had an opportunity to get to know Lori. What a woman! Craig's dedication to his clients is something  I'm amazed Lori can keep up with. She supports and respects his career,, and , in turn,  works as hard as he does for his clients.There hasn't been a day that has gone by that I haven't made it a point to thank God for putting Mason Law in our lives for this leg of our journey.

I live in Phoenix Arizona and had traveled to Spokane Washington as a first time visitor to the state, to meet my girl friends family over the 2019 Christmas break. Unfortunately, my trip was grossly interrupted when I was arrested and falsely accused for Driving Under the Influence of Liquor or Drugs. I was apprehended and incarcerated for over a 15 hour period after being pulled over and compliant during a routine traffic stop. I was in complete disarray and disbelief, as I was a visitor in this beautiful state and completely unaware of any technicalities within the law and therefore my rights. During my time of incarceration my girlfriends family was able to successfully seek legal counsel from a Mr. Alex Biel on my behalf. Despite this arrest happening in the early morning hours (2:30 am) Mr Biel was responsive, proactive, and completely professional in his dealings with us. He immediately came to the jail and met with me to overview the details and proceedings of this matter. I can honestly say he was the informative, assertive and considerate individual that I needed at that time. He provided me with an abundance of information, options and subsequently the relief and reassurance that everything would be ok and work itself out; according to the facts of this case and the parameters of the law. Even providing me his direct and personal phone number for contact when I was to be released, as I had no access to a phone or finances (as they were left in the vehicle) and didn’t know any Washington St numbers by memory. Dealing with Mr. Alex Biel was an absolute privilege! It is refreshing to know there are such upstanding individuals in Washington St, after the way I was mistreated on multiple fronts, by a multitude of civil workers; comprised of men and women that we employ and finance through our state tax contributions. Any legal matters moving forward will no doubt require the services of Mr Alex Biel, as I believe in his competence and integrity to represent me by giving his full effort and close attention on my behalf. Thank you again Mr Biel, it was truly a privilege and I appreciate all of your time and efforts! Onward and upward!

Carson responded to my inquiry soon after I emailed him, gave me a call, and told me he’d work to file the necessary paperwork to resolve my case in court the very next day. He drafted the documents, had me sign them, and took care of everything within 48 hours of initially contacting him, all for a very reasonable fee.

Most importantly, I deeply appreciated that he was professional, empathetic, and took the time to listen to me and provided detailed but concise explanations of the process. It was such a huge relief to feel like I had someone on my team who was not only highly competent but cared about doing everything he could to help me. I would highly recommend Carson and his associates to anyone who is looking for a skilled and compassionate lawyer to be on their team.
Alex resolved my speeding ticket within one week. I never had to worry about a thing. Definitely call Alex if you have a speeding ticket.
Alex, Is very professional & awesome to deal with!!!  I would recommend the firm to everyone!

Alex worked great on my case. The anxiety that goes along with cases like my own, were calmed knowing Alex was on it.  He had answers and actions, and did not financially ruin me. I have always heard bad things about attorneys, but Alex was easy to talk to. He did not sugar coat anything, and explained things so I would clearly understand what was happening. He got the results I was looking for.
Thank you Alex for helping me, and for your hard work. I truly do appreciate you.
I highly recommend you call Alex for your legal needs.

Very thankful Alex Biel was recommended to me. He was extremely thorough and obviously a highly skilled attorney. He compassionately represented my family member, achieving the best outcome. Alex Biel deserves our admiration and gratitude.

Alex took my very complex case involving a dispute with former girlfriend.   His level of knowledge is and was top notch.   He was diligent with my case and kept me informed.

His rapport with prosecutors, fellow defense attorneys and judges was unquestionably positive.

Alex achieved the best possible outcome for my situation.   He is a capable and competent attorney and I would recommend you call him if you've found yourself in a pickle.

Remember, the prosecutors need to have someone working for YOU that THEY respect and trust if they are going to see your side of the matter.  Alex is your guy imho.

Good luck with your own issue.

Alex exceeded all expectations in every aspect of my case. He is respected and highly recommended by his peers. Couldn't have asked for a better outcome in my case as I didn't have to step foot in court. A job well done.
Alex is a great Lawyer. Very fast and was able to fix my problem within 24 hours. He goes over and above to make sure everything everything is done correctly.

We hired Mike Parker to help us close out my father's estate.  Unfortunately i had to fire Mr Parker due to poor communication and failure to competently handle our case including but not limited to the following:
1.  He did not correctly file direct notification with creditors  despite (falsely) informing me that he had filed this notification correctly.  I paid 2 subsequent attorneys to review the case and they both agreed Mr Parker had not filed the notifications correctly consequently leaving the estate liable for future claims.
2.  Mr Parker attempted to negotiate terms with another attorney without my permission and counter to the terms I had specified to Mr Parker
3.  Billing inconsistencies - We were billed for an appointment that did not occur & final bills consistently were in excess of projected estimates.  We were also billed for his review of court documents which i later had to point out contained information counter to what he had told me

Overall i was highly disappointed with the service we received and have subsequently had to hire a new attorney to repeat the work we paid Mr Parker to do

Although they were too busy to take on any new cases, the folks that I spoke to were very nice, courteous, and would probably be a good outfit to work with if they had the time. I appreciate the call back and referrals that were given.

We've used the services of this group, mainly Parker multiple times over the years as well as other immediate family members.  We will continue to use and refer them, always happy & very satisfied with the end result.

All of my fines were forgiven by the two different counties, and I can honestly say now that I am restored, even though I had gotten in trouble in my past, Mark helped me realize that that’s not me anymore and that people can change for the better, he went above and beyond what he actually had to do for me. He continues to bless people‘s lives and is selfless when it comes to helping others and I cannot tell the person who’s reading this review enough this man is amazing and I pray that he is blessed every day and stay in communication with him even after getting my rights restored so thank you so much for being patient with me. Thank you so much for helping me and being patient with the entire situation, thank you so much for guiding me and showing me what I needed to get done in order to get my rights Restored. today I’m a normal part of society. I’m a community leader. I’m somebody who has changed his life. I am somebody that the department of corrections has actually helped become a better person, who also has his concealed weapons permit, which I never would’ve thought would have happened if it wasn’t for Mark helping me. So thank you Mark sincerely, Mr. Lujan another happy person who is blessed by knowing you.

He is good at what he does. Dr. Robbins is a Christian man and he has a caring way of assuaging you and calming you down through the process. I am a physician myself, and I was beyond impressed with his preparation and representation. Without hesitation, I would recommend his counsel for your social security case.

Dr. Robbins is a great attorney. He is a trained medical doctor in addition to being a lawyer. His combined medical education and law degree make him one of the very best disability guys in Washington. He understands not just the law, but the critical medical details of every case he takes. These details make all the difference with Social Security Disability judges. Dr. Robbins sees things other lawyers don't see and he will present your case in ways other lawyers can't because very few attorneys have his level of education and experience.

I have had serious mental illness since I was ten years old. When I met Dr. Robbins I was living on the street and not properly medicated. Nobody was helping me. He was able to track down all my medical records and establish my mental health history for the court. When I had my hearing, the judge sat down at the bench, opened my file, and said, " I have no hesitation whatsoever in making this disability award." The case was so solid and my medical history so well written by Dr. Robbins that the judge not only awarded disability with no questions, but dated my disability to years before and I was awarded money for all that time.

Dale Robbins is an incredible attorney and makes a difference in people's lives by helping them win disability cases. I am an example of this.

Couldn't have asked for a better lawyer. If you got some tough skin, then he will be the guy you want. He truley wants what's in the best interest of the children. He does not tolerate petty bickering situations, he's in it to win for the protection of children. If you really need someone in your corner he's absolutely the best. I felt like I was being spoken down to which was really disgusting. Not sure how they’re able to get any business to be fair, with all due respect I came in with hope as I was recommended to them by my therapist and was shunned for false accusations by someone who glazed over my parenting plan/order without actually getting any factual information. She didn’t feel genuine whatsoever, felt like it’s not about helping people for them, just another pocket to pick. I know you’d want your representation to be tough, thorough, and passionate, but there’s a massive gap of understanding to lead with empathy whilst listening to understand rather then to respond. Better help out there guaranteed!

Hope this helps

I'm recommending Matthew J Dudley to anybody I can.

Matthew Dudley is a gentleman and a scholar; In a league of his own.  An incredible litigator with unmatched skill, professionalism, and integrity. If you want the best in your corner, he’s the one to call.

Dudley went above and beyond for my divorce and protection order for me and my boys.
I was pro se for most of my case as my ex husband was an engineer and I was a stay at home mom.
My friends helped get money together and hired Dudley. He stepped in and made a world of difference!
I had to be in court for days, on the stand for hours. I wouldn't have been able to do it without him 😭
He is a rockstar in court.
Make sure you are self reflective because he will call your crap out and tell you how it is.
I like this about him, but I'm assuming people who don't like to own up to things would hate it lol.
You are hiring him to represent you and not a shoulder to cry on, that's for your friends.
I will forever be grateful for having him as my lawyer 🙏🏼

I hired Matthew for a messy child-custody battle full of underhanded tactics and lies. From our first meeting, he had a clear game plan, refused to let the other side get away with manipulation, and always kept my child’s best interests front and center.
He didn’t hold back calling out every dirty trick and outright falsehood they tried. In court, his cross-exams were aggressive but totally professional, and he tore apart their false narratives one by one.
Because of his laser-focused advocacy, the judge saw through all their fabrications and ruled in my favor. It was exactly what my child and I needed, and honestly, the best money I’ve ever spent I only wish I’d brought him on board sooner.
If you want someone who’ll fight tooth and nail while staying smart and strategic, Matthew’s your guy. He’ll call out the BS, and focus on what matters most for your child, and deliver real results.

The best lawyer money can buy. Hes busy so expect his response times to reflect that, but if he's on your team you dont have a thing to worry about. Dudleys a bullshark and if you let him do his job he will get it done. Responsive, supportive, diligent and determined.

What also stood out to me is how affordable he is, especially for parents who may not have a lot of money to work with. He makes quality legal representation accessible, and that’s rare.
I’ll be recommending him to any parent who needs strong, compassionate legal help. He exceeded all my expectations.

I contacted Mr. Dudley in December of 2019 when I was still pregnant and he gave me legal advice, in which I did not listen to. I tried to be civil with my ex and do a parenting plan on our own to avoid trial. (I regret this now) I got served a proposed parenting plan from my ex and he was trying to take 100% custody of our daughter that he had not seen for months. I contacted Mr. Dudley and hired him. He made me cry a total of 3 times throughout the proceedings. 2 of which were happy tears. The other time he was calling me out for mistakes I have made during the process, and was my own doing. My case will be heard in court again, and I will be calling him back. Mr. Dudley doesn’t have paralegals and the information you give him doesn’t get lost in the office with multiple people. He even works on the weekends and I’ve spoke with him as late as 8 PM weekdays.

Mr. Dudley is one of the most shrewd and intelligent attorneys I have ever met. Came very highly recommended but after several attempts of trying to contacting him he finally answered  and it wasn't because he returned my call,he was very rude ,didn't take the time to listen he acted as if he knew all the answers before the questions were asked just down right rude and showed no care or concern just from the phone consultation I would not recommend him if my depended on it

This is who you want on your side. Matthew Dudley does not appreciate bullies and fights for Justice . I am grateful he is representing me and fighting for my children’s future.

Matthew is an amazing attorney. He keeps it to the truth, the facts, and doesn’t waste time on petty drama and nonsense. He is direct and to the point which is what you want when you are fighting for what matters the most to you. I would not recommend any other attorney!

Mathew did my divorce 22  years ago. I am still stuck with legal issues and costs because of Mr. Did little charged a lot. Property that belongs to my x . I can Not give negative stars as there is no option for that. run as far away from him as you can.

Mr Dudley is amazing he went above and beyond for us.Thank You for the win.

You don’t go to a car mechanic to talk child care, same here, Mr.Dudley gets in and gets out, it’s not some conversation full of fluff, he asks for the details he needs and redirects the conversation in a firm way that someone with no emotional intelligence might take offense to. It’s nothing personal he’s doing his job, and then when he gets in character he’s a boss and spanks the courtroom like it’s an art. The court spanker, court daddy

Lea refuses to help any single mother regardless if the child doesn’t live with the mother

If you have a custody case, you need to call! Dudley is amazing in court and is an excellent atty that will represent you to the fullest for a fair price!

In my experience, it is rare that I feel compelled to write a review for someone unless they have done truly exceptional work. This is only the second time I have ever written a review, the first being for a mortgage lender. With that said, I have to say that Matthew Dudley is an extraordinary and outstanding and somewhat miraculous family attorney who has truly gone above and beyond for us.
We initially learned about Matthew Dudley through a friend, who had been turned down by him for representation. I was therefore hesitant when we first met, but Mr. Dudley quickly proved to be a no-nonsense attorney who tells the truth and is extremely direct, even to the point of being abrasive at times. He will not sugarcoat anything or act as a therapist, but rather, he will fight for you and your family. My father always told me to hire an attorney that other attorneys fear going up against, and Mr. Dudley fits that description.  He is there to represent you and your family to the best of his ability.
We hired Matthew Dudley to help us become de facto parents to our great granddaughter, and after a year of working with him, we went to trial. Matthew Dudley is an excellent trial lawyer, with a dynamic approach and a knack for finding and presenting key information that helped us get everything we asked for. He is also very respectful towards opposing counsel, and I believe that his attention to detail and careful preparation were key to our success in court.
If you are considering hiring Matthew Dudley as your family attorney, I highly recommend him. He is dedicated to his clients, reasonably priced, and will always fight for you and your family. Just be sure to be honest with him and remember that he hates to repeat himself, so it is important to listen carefully to what he tells you. He will return your calls and emails as needed, although at times it may feel like you have not heard from him in a while - this is simply because there is no need for communication, and it is how he keeps his prices affordable. In short, you will not regret hiring Matthew Dudley as your attorney, and he will always be our family's go-to lawyer.

Fantastic family law lawyer.  Mr. Dudley fights for your cause if it makes sense, at least my cause seemed justified to me and we won.  He fights for your family just like you dream a lawyer would. He has a plan and wants to win. Please for the love of whatever you hold dear listen to the man, he wants what's best for your family.

Some people find he is abrasive in person and I can see why they think that. He tells it to you straight with zero sugar. His time is valuable and he is helping a lot of families, that's why I assume he is abrupt. You pay him to fight for you and I don't think your money could get much better.

Fun fact, I had a property lawyer for another dispute and when I told him about Mr. Dudley representing me for family law my lawyer said," Oh you mean business.".

Do what you will with that.

reviews.text:
Teresa did a great job for us on our probate. Her knowledge and experience were hugely helpful.
I would hire her again.

I am deeply frustrated with the lack of action and follow-through from Keene Law. I was assured that there was a clear plan in place for my case, and I trusted Teresa to execute it effectively. Unfortunately, that trust was misplaced.
Despite the promises made, no meaningful action was taken on my case. I was repeatedly told that things were moving forward, but in reality, nothing was being done. My case remained stagnant for far too long. Hiring Teresa caused more harm than help in my life.
I feel misled and disappointed by the lack of progress. If you're looking for an attorney who will actually follow through on their word, I strongly recommend looking elsewhere.
I wish I had paid more attention to the numerous negative reviews of Keene Law before hiring them. Unfortunately, my experience with this firm has proven that the criticisms are entirely accurate.
Despite paying a substantial fee, there was little to no progress on my case, and it felt as though my time and money were being completely wasted.  Teresa was nearly impossible to reach, and when they did respond, their replies were often vague and uninformative. It was clear that my case was not a priority, leaving me feeling neglected and in the dark throughout the process. Do not count on getting any sort of refund for the upfront flat fee even if nothing was accomplished in your case.
The lack of professionalism and attention to detail is consistent with what others have said about this firm. I regret not heeding the warnings in those reviews. If you're considering Keene Law, I strongly advise looking elsewhere. The negative feedback you see is there for a reason—this firm is not worth your time, money, or peace of mind. Teresa is responding to reviews trying to blame the clients, when there are this many complaints for the same reasons it's showing that the complaints are true. Don't fall for the fact that she seems nice and motivated at your consultation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Lynn was attended to constantly and with care on a small flat fee for almost a year and a half. Her case was presented as a simple matter at our initial consult, and then was made much more difficult by the client as time went on. I would create a solution, saving the asset at issue, then had to create another solution, and another. The client tried to create her own solutions, changed her mind frequently, and when I determined I could no longer continue to work it, is now seeking a total refund despite my actually saving the asset at issue. I could’ve revised our contract early on for more money but I did not. This is an unreasonable, unfair and shocking review.

reviews.text: Absolutely horrible. Kept no contact. Took 8 months to even act like she was going to do anything. Was extremely rude to my wife.  And then dropped me because I got irritated with the time frame and way she spoke to my wife update new lawyer pulled all info that was needed up in five minutes of the first phone call. Supposedly took months for Keene law .Definitely go for a larger law office.
reviews.ownerResponse: We contacted this client so frequently that we literally have hundreds of texts from my private cell, texts from our office cell, emails and calls to each other. On the day we removed ourselves from the case, we contacted him about getting his new address as we were setting hearings that day. He and his gf called back screaming and using pretty bad profanity and were unhinged. We could make no sense out of what they were upset about and drowned me out with more screaming profanities when I tried to respond.  I believe his new gf wanted the money that client’s family member had paid us. I can think of no other reason for this complaint or their behavior that day.  Client moved in the middle of the case and did not provide new address. We were always kind and understanding of his health issues. Ŵe were patient with his inability to respond helpfully or quickly. His gf filed a bar complaint and it was dismissed. Sometimes a lawyer gets a curve ball in a case, and the client tries to destroy them through Google reviews.

I expect this review to be removed by Google soon, as it is by an opposing party who is mad because they are losing.  I should leave it as a good review in that I have worked favorably for my actual client?

reviews.text: Teresa is the best! Kind, caring and compassionate.

reviews.text: Would NOT recommend this family law lawyer!  Took advantage of us and was Very hard to get ahold of or for her to respond to you. reviews.text:
The law firm failed to appropriately set or communicate a consultation, resulting in one missed appointment.

Rather than realize that someone contacting a family lawyer must obviously have some serious things going on, the lawyer Teresa herself simply brushed me off and bid me “good luck” because we “don’t seem to be a good fit”.

Attempting to establish a consultation for my custody issue, the paralegal offered some times for an appointment. I confirmed my availability of an appointment on the Friday of a Holiday weekend, and did not receive a response email until 8 minutes (yes, 8 minutes) before the mentioned appointment, confirming our slot.

I responded with the apparent mix up, and tried to set another appointment.

This is when the lawyer, Teresa, emailed me to basically find someone else, since I received text confirmation and didn’t show up.

There was no Text.
There was one email from the paralegal, 8 minutes before an appointment. Phone appointment? Zoom? In person? Who knows.. there were no details.

I would almost understand an unsupportive and / or unfriendly response from someone that didn’t have their name literally on the business, but this was a great indication of the type of individual that would gladly be taking your money.

A business is a business, and it is for making money, but customer service / compassion goes a long way when you’re supposed to be assisting with a customer base that is most likely going through some very tough and stressful situations.

I recommend to anyone reading this to ensure you don’t expect much until you’ve handed over some cash.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Johnson made an appointment and never showed up or called to cancel. He’s a professional crank.

reviews.text:
Stay FAR FAR away from this law office.
I contacted Dennis Hession May 22nd 2024 from a referral to hire him for my probate case for my late father. I gave him all necessary information (death cert. etc) at that time. He did not communicate and sort of timeline as to when my case would be filed, or even when we would meet for signing even though I asked him multiple times. I first contacted him June 3rd via email asking if he could provide a timeframe for my case, he replied saying he was out of town and would get back to me. Which he never did. I emailed him again June 5th asking the same question with still no reply. I emailed again with the same question June 12th.He finally replied to me June 14th to confirm my position with the state. He still refused to give me any sort of date or timeline. I emailed again June 25th asking for the status of my case. In this email I asked him if he was capable of even handling my case as he was so unresponsive. I did not hear back. I then emailed him June 26th letting him know I will be seeking council elsewhere. On June 27th he replied back with all of the documents magically. I never signed any sort of agreement with him and he has now invoiced me for the documents that weren't even submitted to the court. Not only was he unresponsive, but once I told him I was going to look elsewhere he was so rude and unprofessional I was completely appalled. I went to Dennis looking for help after tragically losing my father in his house fire and Dennis was cruel. He is truly an evil human walking among us and any law office that employs him has no ethical standard.
Terrible Closing Experience, Buyers & Sellers Beware Of Using Their Company
They handled the closing of my house when I sold it and they took care of everything and were great to work with.
Won't use them ever again for realstate closing.
Great service. Very helpful.

Schott Law was soooo easy to work with, and they kept my anxiety and stress in an admittedly stressful situation at a minimum. I truly felt they wanted to be a part of my team and that they cared deeply that I get the help I needed. Because of Schott Law, we can finally afford my medical bills without making choices between if the house is warm enough or if there is enough food this month. Now I can focus on what matters - enjoying my time with my family. Thank you for helping me get my life back on the best possible track!

reviews.text:
I am a disabled vet and am unable to work whats so ever.  So when I went for Social Security Disability I believed that the process would make sense and that one agency who puts something in black and white of someone job status would make sense to another agency of similar form.  How I was embarrassingly wrong.  I fought for years to get them to see how serious the situation actually is but the result was to only get one denial after another denial.  On what I figured was my last shot I contacted Maggie Schotts Law Office and they were empathetic and sympathetic to what was occurring.  They talked me through the situation and then jumped right in.  They did everything and anything my wife and I didn't understand they easily and quickly broke it down for us.  As the original court date came Maggie and her staff kept us at ease and ensured we understood everything that would occur.  When the day came Maggie was there first and kept us calm.  However the conclusion of this case would not occur on that date and the case was pushed until my C-file came in.  Even though this added much more stress on to the situation they kept us reassured and walked step by step with us through the continuing months.  As the final date came again Ms. Schott and staff kept in contact and our anxieties down as much as possible.  When her and I were in the court room she made sure I understood everything that was going on and being said around me.  I think the most human and empathetic thing that got me was her emotions to mine and my wife's joy of the approval.  You could see that she truly understood the pain and hardship that these cases cause on disabled individuals and their families.  She and her staff truly care and will fight for the best outcome.  My wife and I will forever will be grateful for the help she provided, the success she got for us, and the real human emotion she displayed.
Thank you Ms Schott and God Bless.
reviews.ownerResponse: I appreciate your heart felt kind words and am so very happy you finally won your claim and SSDIB benefits. Thank you for the positive words and review. We pride ourselves on easing the burden on clients and are delighted you had a positive experience.

reviews.text:
I am a disabled vet who fights the VA for the medical care I need already.  After being denied and falling through the cracks with social security the first round, I knew I couldn't battle both social security and the VA Healthcare system by myself.   I reached out to Maggie's office and just instantly fell at peace knowing someone had my corner to help the upcoming battle with social security.   I am glad I did she was patient, kind, and extremely understanding when I was not quite understanding.   We took the case to hearing in front of a judge and we won.  She thought to even get my original file that showed the reasoning for my medical discharge from the military that included both mental and physicalaspects.  I absolutely couldn't have done this with out Maggie and her team!
If you don't understand or feel the process is becoming overwhelming, Maggie Schott is amazing and I truly cannot thank her enough.

reviews.text:
Maggie was sent as an angel. I fought SSI for 3 years alone as I hadn't needed help for one of my kids' cases. My younger however, was a difficult case. In spite of early documented, life long disabilities that are commonly recognized by state and federal guidelines and the evidence that these disabilities impacted every area of my child's life I had to push to administrative judge hearing. After our first hearing, the judge informed me I was incompetent and therefor it was in my child's best interest to pause the hearing so I could seek appropriate counsel for my child. That she was refusing to hold session until my child had a lawyer, period. I called 3 different places. One said because he didn't receive IEP paperwork he wouldn't take her case (she'd had one for 5 years.) One claimed theyd call me, but "forgot" and explained there had been a big merger and my childs file was misplaced. One stated they would help bit required a $5000 retainer (illegal for disability cases, fyi.) Maggie's name came up in my final desperate Google search and I called and left what must have been a sad, desperate message expecting what I'd had before. An hour later Maggie herself called me. I'd never spoken with an actual attorney before, only the receptionist or the paralegal. She listened to my daughters case for almost an hour, and immediately told me she would take it on. She told me who would call me next and what to expect so I could be prepared. Her office reviewed everything I had, worked with SSI admin office to get what they had, and found the gaps in documentation. They tied everything up with a neat proverbial bow and submitted. Two months later we had a new trial, a pediatrician from UCLA to consult on her case, and in 45 minutes the judge clearly sided with the evidence that my daughter needed to have access to medicaid and the addition supports available for those who are truly disabled. Without Maggie taking the time to listen to my daughters story, I wouldn't have the access to resources to care for her as well, and she wouldn't be doing as well as she is.
10/10 recommended Maggie. And, Maggie if you're reading this, please do not change your model if at all possible. The human touch is what makes you so special for our community.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much. I appreciate the feedback immensely.

reviews.text: Thanks for the work you did on my behalf.
I know that Mary is a top rated civil rights attorney and I would love to work with her although she's booked out for nine months!

Didn't get a chance to meet with Mary, I spoke with her assistant, Cara instead. I had left a voicemail to schedule a consult, Cara called me & began pre-screening me i suppose, asking basic questions, she would cut me off repeatedly, never giving me the opportunity to fully explain or get into details of my case, she would say things like "that's the reason you want to file a lawsuit?" "You need to have evidence/proof of the allegations" and "you don't really have a good enough case to pursue legal action." It wasn't so much what she said, rather, the way she said it, VERY condescending & sarcastic. No empathy what so ever, she was more concerned with getting me off the phone & it was very clear she didn't care in the least bit about my situation. My situation was very intricate, not easy to explain in under 5 minutes, so I offered to email them a timeline of events/occurrences with more detailed info that I had began documenting when my situation began. I had kept VERY good notes, had a lot of evidence & 2 witnesses who were willing to give statements, she declined & wouldn't let me send it! Saying "No, you just don't have a case here, another attorney may take your case but we cannot, Mary works with bigger organizations,  high dollar lawsuits, we don't really take on smaller cases. I said thanks & that was that. The entire phone conversation was less than 5 minutes.
I'm not sure how any attorney or assistant can do a consult in anything under 1 hour. No case is that simple. I looked further into this firm that night & she was truthful about Mary working high dollar lawsuits only. Her website lists her "big wins" and at least one of them was 1 million settlement. Some others were previous police officers of the Spokane County Police Department- cases that were very high profile.  If you don't represent people who aren't high profile or worth 500k+ in a lawsuit,  maybe that should be advertised on your website. Oh...and you should really look into replacing your assistant, Cara, she's not doing your business any favors with her condescending,  sarcastic, discourteous, contentious, insolent attitude. (FYI this was back in March 2020)

Read a lot of positive things about Mary Schultz.  My consultation with her assistant, Cara was absolutely awful. I get that law is hard edged but having someone that condescending, argumentative, insensitive and unkind talking to people about the worst things that have happened to them in their lives and berating them for being nervous when they talk about it (especially after I told her I had PTSD) is not OK. Way to discourage the downtrodden.  I was able to find another office where I was allowed to actually speak and I am now being taken care of.

reviews.text:
MASTER EXHIBIT V‑6.66
WENDY COLTON
Procedural Choreography
& Pre‑Signed Final Order Transmission

Case: 23‑4‑00041‑22
Lincoln County Washington Superior Court

SUBJECT

This exhibit documents the transmission, signature sequence, and filing of a Minor Guardianship Final Order involving Emersyn Avery Smith.

Revealing a procedural pattern in which:

•Orders were signed before judicial review

•Audit trails show completion prior to filing

•The order was transmitted directly to a parent outside formal channels

•The filing date does not match the signature timeline

•GAL and attorney signatures appear pre‑coordinated

•The successor guardian was inserted without due process

•This is a clear example of procedural choreography

•The outcome was arranged first, and the judicial process was applied afterward.

reviews.text:
After both of my parents passed away within a year w/ no will. We hired Whipple Law Group to file probate and administrator the state. After years of working with another attorney to devalue my inherent shares the an estate valued over $500,000. after debts were to be paid. They falsely told me the majority of their fees would be paid by the estate. They refused to summit documentation to support my claim they billed me for all of there services even the ones against my will. They refused me my file at the end of their services causing me more loss to my share and allowed my sisters to take possession of the entire estate and completely diminish it.
When all was said and done my dad's car was charged against my share for way above its value with new damages exceeding $30,000. And beyond that I recieved nothing that belonged to my parents and a overall debt I can't afford to pay. I was very clear I couldn't afford their services and assured if I just made min payments "to keep the lights on." Greg Hills exact words. That in the end I'd get a check back from their office at the close of the estate. This was all a bait and switch lie.
To further the unethical behavior they are still refusing to give me their malpractice insurance information so I can file a claim. I believe these actions to be intentional. However if not. They are certainly incompetent of an attorney specializing in this field of work.
Do not hire this law firm.
File outside of Spokane.
reviews.ownerResponse: The satisfaction of our clients during the emotional time of a probate is our highest priority. We strive to provide our clients with aggressive representation and ongoing updates about their case. Because of privilege issues we cannot provide a specific response to your comments but stand by the legal work that was provided by Gregory Hill. We encourage you to continue corresponding with Attorney Hill, directly, or to give us a call at our office line: 509-869-3223.

All primarily due to a cruel and hateful Uncle, my deceased Mother’s brother.
He has somewhat succeeded in alienating and isolating me with lies. Turning most all of my maternal family members against me.

You would think that your own blood and Uncle would never treat a niece or such a gift of inherited property (that has been in our family for 70+ years) that he received from *his parents* in such a horrible manner.

All money $ aside, I’ve felt very supported.
I could not have moved forward or gone on with this case and my 💞Grandfather’s wishes & legacy without their expert representation, that JDF worked so hard for his entire life!! If you want to hire the best probate law firm in Spokane, worth every penny.

reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! Greg helped me for 2 years going through probate and battling my sister in court over executorship and what everyone got etc. since my father passed unexpectedly and without a will. My sister had stolen from my father's place the day we found out he had passed and tried to take over and leave me with nothing. Greg was incredibly vigilant and compliant with every need I had, got all of the stolen items back, and made darn sure that I was not taken advantage of! I'm only 26 and my sister is way older than me, so I was very worried about the outcome of the matter. I hired them on a Sunday, got appointed executor the next day on Monday, and since that Sunday they worked tirelessly to make sure everything was fair just like I (and my father) wanted! Definitely worth every penny I paid them! I have endless good things to say, they made such a hard and mentally taxing situation such a breeze. I mean this whole heartedly when I say, I COULD NOT HAVE DONE IT WITHOUT THEM! The most perfect blend of professional and friendly/caring/understanding. If I EVER have any legal problems, they will forever be the only people I call! THANK YOU WHIPPLE LAW!!!!!!!

reviews.text:
I’m incredibly grateful to the team at the Northwest Justice Project for the help they gave me during a very stressful eviction case. I felt completely overwhelmed trying to navigate the legal system on my own, and their guidance made all the difference.

Attorney Craig was extremely helpful throughout the process and took the time to explain everything clearly so I could understand what was happening. I’m also very thankful for the support and oversight of Senior Attorney Chris Brunetti, whose involvement through their office helped ensure the case was handled properly.

Because of their attention to the legal details and the way the case was handled, the eviction was ultimately overturned. That outcome truly changed the course of my situation, and I honestly don’t believe I could have achieved that result without their help.

Organizations like Northwest Justice Project provide an incredibly important service to the community. They give people a chance to stand up for themselves in complicated legal situations when they otherwise might not have the resources to do so. I’m deeply thankful for the work they do and for the help they gave me when I needed it most.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your comment!

reviews.text:
So far I have been trying to call for over a month. I finally got ahold of somebody last week and they told me they would call on Monday. But no one has. We haven't heard anything from anyone.  I will update when we finally hear from someone.

EDIT: still no phone call. Still have not heard a peep.

If I could leave zero stars, I would. NJP is a complete farce and doesn't offer any legal services to the low income Spokane population. It's a marketing scheme to secure funding for whoever runs the organization. The "CLEAR Project" is only a few individuals and they cherry pick a handful of cases to approve for NJP.  I've called in every day for 6 months during the specified time and every single time I get the same message about "call volumes are too high". It's a scam. We are on our own against whoever is harassing or attacking you. Good luck ✊
When I called them, they said they were too busy and I never received a call back from them.
Never contacted me the day of court, not before and not after. I was told I'd be contacted, but no, they just got rid of me as fast as they could.

I've repeatedly been referred to them, and upon contacting the NJP, I've repeatedly ended up very disappointed. Simply put, upon contacting them as (in recent years) both indigent and legally disabled individual (and target/victim of many years of documented abuse by narcissistic sociopath ex-wife, her many enablers, and ultimately the state of WA itself; matters to be addressed in federal court and with DOJ very soon), not once did Northwest Justice Project provide any kind of real legal assistance or even useful legal referrals. Repeatedly. Low-income residents of this massively corrupt, lawless state need and deserve better legal resources to be able to fight back the abuse, discrimination and tyranny.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for this feedback.  We are sorry to hear about your experience.  We are committed to reducing barriers to accessing legal services, but unfortunately, we don’t have sufficient staffing in all our offices to offer immediate intake. We do have several ways people can apply for services. CLEAR is our centralized intake hotline, and you would need to call 1-888-201-1014 weekdays between 9:15 am - 12:15 pm.  We will determine if you are eligible for our services, which are focused on problems that affect basic needs such as housing, income, medical care, and family safety.  You can also fill out an online intake form (https://nwjustice.org/apply-online) if you have one of these issues: eviction, debt, government benefits, or special education.  If you are facing eviction, you can call our Eviction Defense Screening Line (855-657-8387). Due to limited resources, lawyers and paralegals are not able to assist every caller, but we do our best to assist in any way that we can.

If you find yourself needing legal assistance in family matters, I highly encourage you to consider Kapri Law & Consulting. Their dedication, empathy, and expertise make them a standout choice, ensuring that you are not just another case, but a valued individual. You will receive the support and guidance you need to navigate this challenging journey effectively. Thank you, Shadan Kapri, for your unwavering support!

Our further interactions highlighted her intelligence, efficiency, and ability to skillfully navigate the difficult task of being realistic about the likelihood of various potential outcomes.

My situation ultimately pivoted into no longer needing a lawyer's long-term assistance. Shadan helped me wrap my case up with ease; supporting my choices respectfully, and handling all of the final tasks in her signature organized way.

I would not hesitate to recommend Shadan to anyone in need of world-class legal assistance; particularly if that need comes at a time when that beautiful touch of human empathy can make all the difference.

Shadan Kapri is a compassionate, professional, and supportive mentor and was a fantastic guide as I navigated the legal complexities that come with divorce. Shadan is amazing! She’s the best attorney I’ve ever had! She’s very professional, knowledgeable, and truly cares. Her legal work was top-notch—thorough, strategic, and effective. Worst experience I've ever had with an attorneys office. Phelps & Associates was retained on behalf of my father who was being medically neglected in Benton County Jail. His office assured me they would fight for alternative detention methods and do so immediately. They dragged their feet for weeks after being retained. Ignored my calls or told me the attorney I retained left the firm and I would have to wait for Doug. I was excited to have the senior attorney at the firm handling our case, although I know now that was probably the worst outcome. Doug never made it a priority to educate himself on my father's case. He would attend court hearings remotely and was constantly unable to operate the WebEx, having issues hearing the judge or really not understanding the proceedings. But, would refuse to hold his ground about these technical issues as the hearings proceeded. Anytime I would respectfully object or question his behaviors he was threaten to drop us as a client. Unfortunately, the money paid to him was all we had for defense services so there wasn't much we could do. In conclusion my father was granted alternative monitoring but at his own expense (even though he was declared indigent by the courts). I had a few hundred dollars remaining owed to his office but due to the unexpected expense of home monitoring placed on me, I asked if at the least they could wait until his montioring was complete before I remitted payment. They immediately sent the account to collections.

This attorney severely lacks empathy or common courtesy for his clients. Do yourself a favor, look elsewhere for representation unless you wish to be ignored and extorted.
Doug and his associates defended to the best of their ability in court. Very nice people and know how to defend you when your in trouble

reviews.text:
I can't stress enough how wonderful Emily and Kelli were for me after my sister passed away.

I came up to Spokane when my sister was hospitalized and soon after, found out she had stage 4 cancer. To say the least, it was a roller coaster ride and very very stressful. We brought her down to California so she could be with family but it wasn't too long afterwards, she peacefully passed away.

The next step was dealing with her estate. We thought we could "do it ourselves", first having a Power of Attorney, then moving on to a Living Trust. But, we quickly found out that that wasn't enough. Doors were starting to shut on us and we realized that dealing with the estate of a loved one, especially while living in another state, wasn't that simple.

Trying to find a good paralegal to take care of things, would have taken a long time and would be a shot in the dark seeing as we live a thousand miles away. Thank goodness the simple title of "Spokane Wills, Trusts and Probate" caught my eye, so I called.

Emily set up a consultation with me very quickly. She took the time to listen to my concerns and questions and answered me in a way that a stressed out woman would understand. In other words, She was very kind.

A burden was lifted and I could finally take a breath. I could e-mail Emily in the morning and she would usually answer by the end of the day taking me through the steps I needed to do, even calling me direct if need be. She also recommended certain things that could be done in our particular case to save us money!

If you're feeling lost in the maze of dealing with your loved ones estate, all the laws pertaining to it and all the things that need to be done, I would recommend Emily, Kelli and her highly capable staff, one hundred percent.
reviews.ownerResponse: Margaret- thank you very much for your review! We are so pleased to have been able to help you with your sister's estate.

reviews.text: Emily and Kelli are absolutely fantastic! They radiate warmth, professionalism, and kindness. reviews.text:
We needed a really good attorney for an Emergency Guardianship case involving two young children. These children had been repeatedly placed in and out of our care for four years. We had already adopted one of their half siblings 9 years ago.
We hired Dena Allen. I could write a novel about this case and amount of time and quality work Dena and her staff put in for us. Our case went on for nearly one year with many twists and turns. It was very complicated. In the end we were granted Guardianship of the children until their 18th Birthdays. Thank God.
My “big family” will always be so grateful for Dena Allen and her Staff. We couldn’t have accomplished this without them.
I recommend Dena Allen to everyone!! If you’re serious about hiring a highly qualified Attorney who goes above and beyond for you please call Dena Allen.

I had spoken with 5 other attorneys before choosing Matt to represent me.
Having had a stressful challenge with an international custody battle involving two young children, Matt took time to fully understood my case and situation .
He has a very calm demeanor, is thorough with family law and represented my case with expertise in the courtroom.
I felt like he also did his best with time management between himself and his paralegal Jaymie, to keep costs as low as possible.
I am very pleased with the representation and the professionalism of Matt and his staff during this difficult time.

During the hardest and most emotionally challenging time of my life, Matt and his team were my voice of reason and expertise, and led me well through the entire process. They are people of high integrity, complete honesty, compassion and a wealth of knowledge and experience. I would absolutely trust Matt and his team with any legal matter, and am so grateful they were my legal and personal representation!
lady was extremely rude and dismissive. unacceptable

I cannot, in good conscience, recommend Dena Allen as a mediator. During our session, she referenced a photo my ex supposedly had of a garage sale sign in front of my house and questioned why I hadn’t given my ex half the proceeds. I explained that no such garage sale had ever occurred. Her response was, “I saw the picture.”

When I asked if she had reviewed the metadata to verify the date and location of the photo, she admitted she had not. I offered to provide written statements from my neighbors confirming that no garage sale had taken place, but she just looked at me with visible disdain. It was clear she had already made a judgment based solely on a photo presented by my ex.

Despite my attorney requesting the original photo, my ex never submitted it. It was proof that the meta-data couldn’t show when it taken or when. Nevertheless, the mediator chose to take it at face value, without requiring any verification. Mediators are expected to remain impartial and fact-driven. Unfortunately, that was not my experience.

Hands down this is one of the best lawyers i have ever dealt with. I am prior law enforcement and family court was terrifying to think about. Robin Schmahl has been a life saver for us. My husband's ex is very abusive and we had multiple issues with cps and mental health issues with mom. Robin was able to deal with everything including communicating  with the mother for us! Its not common for a father to get full custody but Robin helped us show that his ex is mentally ill. Its been five years since the court said she had to get a mental health evaluation or lose the kids. She still has not gotten the evaluation but constantly threatens us. Robin is always there to help! We do not know what we would do without her!

Great company to work with. One of their attorneys Evan Dobbs was outstanding. He was very knowledgeable and easy to work with. I can not recommend him enough if you are looking for a hard working great attorney.

This was a horrible experience to say the least. My situation was messy and the outcome was not guaranteed by any means but the service we received was awful. I was extremely detailed in my first phone call to the office but apparently the reception didn’t relay that info because when we met Dena Allen she had no idea why we were sitting in the office, clearly she was not given any of my intake information. Cut to no communication and constant emailing to make sure we were on the same page. All of which we were charged for. I expect more for my money and this was a complete waste of time and funds for our cause.

I cannot recommend Evan Dobbs enough. He was so incredibly helpful during my divorce. He was compassionate, driven, and extremely professional. I have recommended him before and will always recommend him.

Robin Schmahl is amazing. She thoroughly understands the legal aspects, as well as understanding how to guide you, the parent, through the process. Knowledgeable of the law, detail oriented, with a warm personality to guide you, what else could you ask for? If you want peace of mind, choose Robin.

Evan Dobbs and his paralegal Bailie provide exceptional legal council. Evan is highly intelligent —able to comprehend the issues at hand then put together a plan for success. If you are in need of a talented professional who cares about you, call Evan Dobbs!

Very happy I was referred to this firm and that I had great representation looking after my interests. Highly recommend!

Robin Schmahl represented me through a very difficult divorce. She was knowledgeable, empathetic, and incredibly organized. I especially appreciated her diligence, integrity and professionalism throughout the entire process, and would highly recommend her legal expertise.

Evan Dobbs has helped me on 3 different occasions dating back to January 2023 when I have needed legal help related to family law. Each time, I felt like Evan truly cared about my individual case. He is professional, straightforward about what to expect, he is very well prepared for when it comes time to be in court and in front of a judge. She was the only one that was genuine and sincere in her approach. I had a lot of anxiety going through the process, but her approach, attitude, and trustworthiness kept me calm and grounded. She is extremely knowledgeable, but won’t hesitate to reach out to a subject matter expert if a situation comes up that she has limited experience in. Like I said earlier, she really has your best interests at heart. She’s also very upfront and honest and will let you know if something isn’t a reasonable request. I never once had an issue with her not getting back to me. She was very timely in her responses and I never had to ask for an update on anything she was taking care of. She stays on top of your case and makes you feel like her top priority. In the end, my case concluded in the best outcome I could’ve hoped for. I really can’t recommend her enough. reviews.text: Matt and Shayla we extremely helpful! Matt was the only attorney I called that called me back and/or was willing to Answer my questions and actually want to help and take the time to listen to me.  His paralegal Shayla is amazing! She was quick to respond and quick to draw up new parenting plan papers. I really can’t thank them enough for helping me through uncharted waters.

Joe Linehan handled my custody case and helped me receive the results that are in the best interest of my child. He was very thorough, efficiently communicated through either himself or his assistant Erin, and made sure that everything was done correctly in a timely manner.

Even before I hired him in July 2019 he took the time to review my case and make sure that it would be worthwhile to file so as not to waste my time and money if it had no chance of going anywhere. Once he determined there was cause to file for a custody modification I hired him and presented him with a multitude of evidence to go through.  He read through everything and lead me through the process of filing with the courts for a modification and emergency change to custody so that my child would not be forced to return to an unhealthy environment. Joe worked with me via phone and email as I live more than 5 hours away in Western WA. He helped me fill out multiple forms, write declarations, and present my evidence to the court. He also represented me in multiple court hearings and trial and always presented the facts and made sure the judge understood the issues in the case. He even tried to guide the other party as to the proper steps to take in court when they were pro se. He really cared about the outcome of the case and worked with me extensively to draw up a proposed parenting plan to present to the other party for settlement, and then for trial once settling didn't pan out. In the end the judge granted my proposed parenting plan and now my child does not have to worry about being in an unhealthy and unstable environment any longer. Joe also offered to help in the future with any issues that may come up with the parenting plan.

Thank you Joe and Erin for all your hard work and effort. Without you I don't think I would have been able to modify my parenting plan and make sure my child is safe, healthy, and happy! I would 100% recommend this firm, and Joe Linehan specifically, to any person having custody/family law issues in the Spokane area.

reviews.text: Dan literally changed my life.  He came recommended by way of a different lawyer who was working my case who ended up being promoted to judge in the middle of my legal proceeding.  I was so scared and had had an awful thing happen to me while working at a VERY large fortune 500 company.  It was sort of like David and Goliath going into it… words alone can’t express how trustworthy, patient and kind Dan was to me.  I was traumatized and he took things at my pace, gave excellent advice and even told me what advice he wouldn’t give which made me trust him more.  We walked away with far more than I would ever have imagined from a trial scenario let alone doing it by way of meditation/settlement beforehand and sidestepped litigation altogether.  I didn’t even have to talk about what happened to me with the other side or with the mediator.  Dan handled it all, got it approved in the most favorable jurisdiction for my type of suit and brought on a most incredible, complimentary team that knocked it out of the park.  I’m humbled and just so totally grateful that there is someone as decent as Dan in this world.  I can’t say enough about how well every step of the way was handled.  He is 100% a gift from God in a very uncertain arena.

If you ever need a kind and sincere listening partner, Dan welcomes you with an open ear. If you have a question he's got the answer. I want to thank Mr. Hayward for his sincere perspective and kind heart.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the rating. As an attorney, I routinely fight cases for multiple years. In the vast majority of long cases, I do not receive pay unless we win or settle in the end. It is no simple task. I am rarely eager to enter litigation because it is hard, costly, emotional, and frustrating. For that reason, any litigant (clients) must be wary of what is ahead. No one should eagerly file suit because the road ahead is very difficult and full of uncertainty.

reviews.text: This attorney took the time to have a 30 minute conversation with me for free to help advise me on a proper course of action. He was very kind, knowledgeable and genuine.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind review! At Hayward Law, we work hard to help people and it doesn't always have to cost money. We stand by our commitment to offer free consultations and you should always have a sense of your case before you decide to pay an attorney for more time.

reviews.text: I have had limited consultations with Dan Hayward on two unrelated to each other employment matters. He was prompt in responding, courteous, knowledgeable and realistic. He'd discuss options while reminding me of the intrinsic imbalance of power in right-to-work states; and that one can get terminated for no valid reason or even any reason at all, as long as it's not discrimination against a protected class. I highly recommend this labor/employment attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind review! At Hayward Law, we strive to inform people from the beginning because litigation is costly, long, and often uneventful. Sometimes the most impactful advice is a simple email or call to discuss the possible outcomes. We look forward to helping people navigate their legal rights.

reviews.text: Called to get info regarding discrimination in my workplace and I was quickly dismissed saying it sounds like emotional distress instead of hearing all of my concerns of discrimination. My phone call with this attorney was like he was representing my workplace.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you felt that you had a poor experience. Undertaking a lawsuit is one of the hardest and most grueling things a person can do. Lawsuits frequently persist for multiple years and cost a lot of money. That is why people call attorneys because we have experienced the hardship and success of litigation and trial.  Cases must be carefully vetted from day one. I don't sugar coat my opinions and I believe people deserve the honest truth. It is unfortunate if someone is unhappy about the advice they receive, but it will not change the fact that I will continue to offer free and honest case evaluations. I will need to clarify one comment for the public. Emotional distress damages are recoverable in employment lawsuits. It is an actionable legal claim plaintiffs can make; it would not be a dismissal of a claim.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry that you had an unfavorable experience. At Hayward Law, we strive to be very accessible and exceed expectations. Other firms will hire 3rd party answering systems to field your calls, or screen most callers, or force you to talk to non-attorneys. Other attorneys charge you for a basic consultations - we don't do any of those things. We want to hear from you and we want an opportunity to help you. We are in business because of you and we look forward to finding ways to help you. You can usually connect with an attorney the first day you call. The vast majority will connect with us by the second day. We respond to emails and texts. Those callers will get a free consultations from an attorney. But we can't offer a tremendous amount of time for free. Keep in mind, we need to help our current clients who have deadlines and hefty legal needs. We cannot offer multiple free consultations for the same legal issue and we do not have the resources to accept every case.
