reviews.text:
I was represented by Kara Hill. She did absolutely nothing to help me. Whenever I had a question for her, she pawned me off on Casey Flores, who was rude, disrespectful and highly inappropriate it’s her language.
Any questions my family or myself had were met with arguing and telling us it couldn’t be done. Our opinions didn’t matter. The only thing that mattered to Kara and the only time she would communicate with us was when she needed more money.
When I was going in to mediation with Casey, an hour before the appointment, Kara emailed my parents saying if they didn’t give her $5,000 more she would cancel the meeting. This was after Casey had told us don’t worry about it. We will take care of that after the appointment. Proving the office is not on the same page.
Kara works most of the time out of Davenport and doesn’t like to be in the courtroom. She likes to zoom. Once, 10 minutes before a hearing she actually texted me asking if I was going in to court. This might not seem like a big deal to her but this was my life and my son I was fighting for!
Thankfully I hired Christine Gallagher and she won everything I was asking for at the very beginning. She believed in me and fought for me. They was the exact opposite from what I got from Kara Hill. From the beginning she treated me like she was doing me a favor to even represent me. Casey talked to my entire family with distain and purposeful hurt, making a highly emotional situation worse than it needed to be. Do Not hire anyone that works for the Legal Hill.
Absolutely amazing people staff and practices. Makes a person feel like there's hope at the end of a hard battle.

The very best. Working with Attorney Kara Hill and her paralegal was an absolute blessing during one of the most challenging times in my life. From the very first consultation, Kara demonstrated not only her deep knowledge of custody cases but also a rare combination of professionalism, empathy, and genuine care for her clients. She approached my case with clarity and confidence, always taking the time to explain every option and strategy in terms I could understand. Kara was assertive when necessary, thoughtful in her recommendations, and unwavering in her dedication to reaching the best possible outcome. Equally impressive was her paralegal, who was incredibly organized, responsive, and supportive throughout the entire process. No question went unanswered, and I always felt informed and reassured thanks to their seamless communication and teamwork. I know that custody cases are never easy, but unlike the first attorney I had, with Kara and her assistant by your side, you truly feel like you have advocates who not only know the law inside and out but also genuinely care about your well-being and your future. I couldn’t be more grateful for their work and would recommend them to anyone in need of compassionate, skilled legal representation.

Ms. Hill and her legal team were great. Not only did they help me win my case, but they also helped me learn to navigate co-parenting. They were prompt in their responses, and they always kept me informed. They were also very thorough with their documents. They were available after hours on many occasions, when I had questions or concerns also. I highly recommend The Legal Hill for anyone who needs legal help.

I cannot say enough positive things about Kara Hill and her team! From the beginning Kara and her team demonstrated not only deep expertise in family law but a genuine care and compassion for my situation. She took the time to listen and explain every step of the legal process clearly and made me feel supported and well informed.  Kara was consistently professional, responsive, and strategic in her approach to my case. Her attention to detail and strong advocacy were evident in everything she did and her ability to remain calm and focused even in high stress moments helped ease my own anxiety through the case.  Thanks to her dedication and skill I got an amazing outcome!  I would highly recommend Kara Hill and her amazing team!

I had the privilege of working with Kara Hill during one of the most challenging times in my life—my divorce—and I can confidently say she was the steady, knowledgeable, and compassionate guide I needed throughout the process.

From the beginning, Kara was attentive and took the time to truly understand the details of my case. She explained every step clearly and kept me informed, which helped ease a lot of the stress that comes with navigating the legal system. Her communication was always prompt and professional, and I always felt like a priority, not just another case.

What really stood out was Kara’s ability to balance assertiveness with diplomacy. She advocated for my interests firmly but was also solution-oriented, which helped move the process forward more smoothly than I expected. Whether it was negotiating terms or representing me in court, she brought a level of preparation and calm confidence that made a real difference.

Thanks to Kara’s dedication and experience, the outcome of my case was fair and allowed me to move forward with peace of mind. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend her to anyone facing a divorce or family law issue.

Kara Hill is probably the worst attorney i have ever encountered and by far the worst experience i went through.   First off, you will rarely speak with Kara, instead she pawns you off to her minion, Casey Flores.  Casey is extremely unprofessional and foul mouthed.  Casey is textbook personality type passive aggressive.   100%
This case involved myself and i needed extreme care with her case.  My parents had both been in divorces in Washington and were familiar with how cases are handled.  We had many questions, not questioning her knowledge but rather more on the lines of, had laws changed since we had gone to court.  Things were being handled so differently, the excuse given was due to covid...things had changed.  When we were finally able to see Kara Hill in action it was via Zoom.  We would soon learn that Kara rarely if ever went to court in Spokane, she would zoom those cases.  We found out she spent the majority of her time in Davenport!  Awesome....
Watching Kara Hill handle the hearings of  was painful.  Like watching a child play with a gasoline can next to a fire.  She was unprepared, acted clueless about the case, failed to bring up important testimony or facts in arguments and literally pissed off the commissioner so much we got fined.  Then her minion Casey proceeds to blame us for the failure at court!  We had provided extra testimony in the event they could use it....which THEY CHOSE TO!  Which led to it being removed due to it not being filed in the beginning of the case.  Which...if you're an attorney who understands law wouldn't have allowed it but rather would've book shelved it for Trial.  This is just 1 example of her failures, the only thing I can say she did right was firing us as her clients.  Which she had threatened us with on multiple occasions even once on the day of a hearing!!!  Extremely unprofessional and untrustworthy.  We were given 3 days to find a new attorney.
This is when we were blessed.  We found Christine Gallagher who hands down is far superior in comparison to Kara Hill.  For your family law use Christine Gallagher, by far the best in every way.
One more thing.....only refer Kara Hill to someone you hate and you want them to lose in court.

Sincerely Reilly Claridge and Family

P.s.  The truth about how you handle your business and your lack of knowledge in your field of work is not an attack on you but rather the truth of letting others know how awful you are.  You had no trouble contacting and involving her parents when you needed more money to continue the case!  Nice try to hide behind it wasn't your client.  Correct my young daughter was and you failed miserably representing her.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Our office takes pride in offering professional and transparent legal guidance. To ensure accuracy, we must collect some basic information before providing a quote or legal opinion. You didn't feel comfortable sharing any details about the case and wanted to verify our office. Without reviewing a case, it’s not viable to give a reliable estimate — especially given the frequent changes and complexities in immigration under the current administration.

We completely understand your hesitation and would be happy to meet with you in person to verify our office and discuss your mother’s case directly. Please feel free to contact us to schedule an in-person consultation. As it was explained to you at the time of making the appointment, the appointment is free, the $50 fee is a security deposit to protect our staff's time and ensure you come to the appointment. It was refunded to you and it does take a few business days to show up in your bank account.

reviews.text: The service provided was consistently unsatisfactory and is not recommended. I experienced significant delays and communication issues, including unanswered calls and frequent voicemail. (I would call using an alternative telephone number, and the recipient would respond.)Furthermore, I was subjected to repeated requests for document resubmission and a lack of progress updates. I was informed that the assigned case work was no longer with the firm and was subsequently assigned to another caseworker. A month later I was informed my 2nd case worker Diana Rivas, had done nothing with my case, there was zero progress established. I am now on my 3rd case worker. I was also given inaccurate and misleading information regarding the DACA process. This firm is not recommended for immigration legal advice, as they are unable to deliver the services paid for!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Joseph,

Thank you for your feedback. Some of the information in your review is not accurate. Our team has presented several options regarding the DACA case, but the choice was not to proceed with them.

As you may know, the DACA program has been subject to ongoing changes due to court decisions, executive orders, and continuing litigation. These shifts can create understandable confusion, and our goal has always been to keep you informed as those legal developments occur.

We’re sorry to hear that you’re dissatisfied, and we’d like the opportunity to make things right by you. Please contact our office directly, either by phone or through your client portal, so we can review your situation and address your concerns regarding new DACA petitions.

I had the unfortunate experience of working with Kelly Sawyer at Robert Klossy’s office to represent me in a parenting plan and DVPO case. I can confidently say that this was the most unprofessional, unethical, and incompetent legal service I have ever encountered.

From the start, it was clear that Kelly’s focus was more on superficial appearances than providing competent legal representation. Her “gimmick” of wearing pink seemed to be the only aspect of her work that stood out. Throughout my interactions with her, I was consistently treated with disrespect. There were several instances where she yelled at me over the phone, creating an extremely hostile and unprofessional environment. In one particular email exchange, after I pointed out over 30 typos in a legal document, she shockingly responded by accusing me of making her feel like she was experiencing domestic violence.

Kelly also fabricated scenarios that never happened, insisting we include false information in legal responses. This approach directly harmed my case, as a judge later referenced one of these false claims during a hearing. Her lack of respect from commissioners and judges in Spokane was evident, and it affected my case’s outcome.

Her unprofessional behavior extended beyond the courtroom. She unnecessarily escalated conflict by cursing at the stepmother of the defendant, further complicating an already difficult co-parenting situation. Rather than helping, her actions made things worse and were even brought up in court as a detriment.

On top of her unprofessional conduct, Kelly consistently charged me for work that was either never completed or never submitted to the court. I was billed over $3,000 for services that I never received, nor did the court. It became clear that her billing practices were dishonest and exploitative.

One of the most disturbing experiences was when Kelly called me on speakerphone with other people in her office listening in, laughing at my serious concerns. This blatant disregard for client confidentiality and professionalism was shocking and incredibly disheartening.

Kelly’s lack of preparation was another glaring issue. Her idea of preparing for court was walking from her office to the courthouse while chain-smoking, with no meaningful work being done on the case. Her poor personal hygiene, including consistently bad breath and visibly poor dental health, only added to the overall lack of professionalism.

In summary, I strongly urge anyone seeking legal representation to avoid Kelly Sawyer and Robert Klossy’s office at all costs. Their behavior is not only unprofessional but unethical. They seem to prey on vulnerable individuals in desperate situations. There are far better and more affordable options available. Save yourself the stress, time, and money by seeking competent legal counsel elsewhere.

If you are going to spend the $450 I suggest you ask if they have looked at the documents you provide them before you start talking.  Then let them start the lawyer talk

They were clear, strategic, and kept me informed every step of the way. Dave Crouse is a true professional: sharp, approachable, and fully committed to his clients. He didn’t just give great legal advice; he truly advocated for me.

This firm does great work! I would recommend their services.

We live in California, and our case was in Spokane Washington, he was so great to work with very helpful the entire way through the process. His team was very professional and supportive as well. Thank you for a great job!

We have used Alison Erickson as our family attorney for the last 3 years. She is beyond professional, super attentive, kind hearted and goes above and beyond to always see the whole picture. A Family law case can cause so much divisiveness and really can be emotionally draining, but having Alison as our attorney and in our corner has helped our family stay positive, confident and we always feel heard. She is fantastic at making sure we completely understand the limits within the law and she is always clear in explaining things in a way anyone can comprehend. I recommend her to anyone in need of a go-getter, high intelligent, warm and kind attorney who gets the job done.

This office could not have been more contemptuous when I sought a consultation for a family friend seeking a divorce. I am also an attorney, in Denver Colorado, and I was not impressed. This firm only seems to value the assets of high value (aka rich) clients. Go elsewhere.

Sara tried to handle our custody case but was too busy to do a thorough job. She was difficult to get a hold of and didn't follow up with other people who contacted her. We switched to another law firm and consulted with another. Both law firms suggested we were overcharged for the small amount of work she performed.
Their professional support and commitment made all the difference in getting my daughter home. I can’t thank them enough for their expertise throughout the process!

So to start off, I’m pretty much disappointed hired this firm because of the reviews and had Dana Brimmer as my lawyer for a parenting plan case…there was little to 0 communication when I’d email I wouldn’t hear anything for days then when things needed to be submitted I got a call a day or hr before it was to be submitted and felt rushed. Put 4k in the trust and because she no longer works for the firm I have to go outside to a new firm and put an additional 5k towards someone else. It’s frustrating and bank breaking. I felt like I got scammed because there was really in nothing achieved and on received 1400 back. It’s hard enough trying to save money but now I have to go into debt because the unprofessionalism I received.

Norann Beidas took on my divorce case when I needed to move on from another attorney that wasn't a good fit.  Norann was compassionate, direct, positive and calming throughout this painful process.  Her skills to protect my interests and negotiate a settlement so this case did not have to go to trial were exemplary.  Norann's ability to work like a bulldog FOR me, yet WITH the other side, for compromise, made for the best outcome for me. Her team, Shyelle and Alexis, were outstanding, professional, kind and efficient throughout this arduous process.  If you want strength laced with outstanding legal ability and kindness, they are who you should hire.

Norann Beidas and Shyelle McCain did such and amazing job for me. they are both very professional in what they do.  I thank the both of you for everything you have done for me in my case and would go back to them in the future.

Norann Beidas and David Crouse are the dynamic due. They were helpful getting all the parameters of my case hammered out and succinctly and confidently went into trial. I am thrilled that I went with this team.

Noraan Beidas was amazing and instrumental in helping me receive fair custody of my child. She was efficient with her time and anticipated problems before they happened. She also seemed to take personal joy and genuine interest in my case, which made all the difference. I would absolutely work with her again.

I needed emergency orders for a situation I was too emotionally involved in to navigate. Karissa Shaffer knew exactly what to do, how to do it, and completed the steps immediately and expertly. I believe she even worked late to get the emergency orders I needed within a few days of hiring her. By the end of the month, she knew my case inside and out and was able to represent me exactly the way I wanted her to. Our actions were successful, her advice was spot on and I couldn't be happier with the level of service I received from her assistant, Anne, and her.

Norann and her team wasted no time getting me out of an unsafe situation and sticking to the relevant points in securing me a fair and equitable outcome so far, in an otherwise hellish process. These ladies have an obvious understanding of where to focus their time and your investment. I will recommend them to anybody else in my position.

I was referred to Norann Beidas by another attorney.  Although I am not a client she did give me some limited legal advice that was helpful.  I have let her know that if I do need someone to represent me she is who I will choose.
Highly recommend this firm for family law matters. David and Alison’s work was very impressive.
Receptionist was rude and unprofessional,  no legal training and decided the legality of the case without even trying to let us speak to anyone who would actually know.

Norann Beidas is nothing short of AMAZING!!!  She is calm, compassionate and confident!  I was working with another law firm and after a year and a half was frustrated with no end in sight of closing a simple divorce for my daughter.  This wonderful woman took the tiger by the tail and convinced the opposing counsel to settle out of court in a very short period of time.  Norann was truly professional, kind, helpful and engaged at every meeting!  She communicated with us throughout the entire process, never once making us feel we were on the clock.  Norann was timely with responses and did her homework!  She handled our case with the utmost care and expertise from start to finish!  If you need a family law attorney that can get the job done, look no further!

Most cases don’t go to trial, but unfortunately mine did. I can’t imagine having a better team behind me than Crouse Erickson. Even though it was 10 years ago, I’ve needed their legal assistance several times to navigate issues that have arisen due to children circumstances. Every time, the outcome was positive. Crouse Erickson are well respected and I feel secure knowing that I can call them whenever any situation occurs that my family needs legal assistance.

I highly recommend Crouse Erickson. My attorney was Alison Erickson she gave me individual attention and made me feel like I was her only client. She always answered my questions thoroughly and promptly. Every staff member I encountered treated me with respect and were sympathetic to my situation. M’liss was really on the ball. She always made sure I was advised on the process and ensured that my case stayed on schedule. I would not have ended up with a fair settlement if I did not hire Crouse Erickson.
Good people,  straight forward.

I am so thankful for Norann Beidas and this law firm! Norann helped me with my very difficult custody battle! I truly appreciate all that she did as well as the others that helped! Norann took on my case knowing the difficulties of my case and got me everything that I asked for! Thank you!!

Great law firm and Evan Dobbs is a Great attorney. Definitely will tell you how it is and is certainly looking out for your best interests. I went through a horrible divorce with a child and because I was in the military it was very hard to get 50/50 custody. However, with Evan’s outstanding knowledge of the law and his educated and experienced advice I was able to get 50/50 custody. I am now living my life with little to no influence from my ex wife and I am to thank Evan for that. There were times were I was scared to death of not being able to see my son a for more then 6 weeks a year. But, Evan was able to fight and make sure that didn’t happen. I would recommend him to anyone.

I highly recommend David Crouse. With his experience, reputation, and preparedness, he provides the highest quality representation for his clients. I also appreciate that he approaches his cases ethically and honestly. You can be confident in his representation of you in your divorce.

We had to hire Crouse Erickson for an anti-harassment order because of a problem neighbor in our HOA. It was fully resolved in just a few days with only a letter and at really minimal cost. We couldn’t have asked for better service.
Provides excellent results in a timely manner. I highly recommend Norann Beidas if you need assistance with a custody case.

I hired Crouse Erickson to assist with my modification of a parenting plan. The plan I had was a mess and my sons father wasn't willing to budge on anything. Alison was able to help me through court hearings and finally mediation with a plan that gave me more meaningful time with my child outside of school and work. My ex was no longer able to strong arm me over the plan. I would strongly recommend hiring Alison.
I highly recommend Alison Erickson to anyone needing a family law attorney. She provides good strategy, executes accordingly and her support team is amazing!

David Crouse is an exceptional family law attorney and I give him my highest recommendation. He and his legal assistant Sandi have also handled parenting plan and custody modifications for me. The process of working with them was much smoother than I could have expected, and the level of expertise and professionalism from both of them made them a pleasure to work with.

Crouse Erickson is the best family law firm out there. They really helped me out when i had no hope. My ex told me all I would get was every other weekend. Instead I have 3 days/nights each week week my boy.  I couldn’t be happier! I would highly recommend hiring Alison if she’s taking new clients.

Crouse Erickson did an amazing job representing me during a difficult and lengthy divorce. I was fortunate to have this firm on my side when times were tough and I needed reliable professional advice and attention to detail.

reviews.text:
I was initially referred to the office by several mutual clients, and was disappointed initially to hear, the original attorney I wanted to consult with was no longer practicing family law. But I met with the suggested attorney that replaced him, and unfortunately we did not jive well,  simply due to the complexity of my case and opposing counsel. This almost turned to be a not so good thing, but Mr. Crouse, takes pride in his work and the work of his team. He personally took over my case to see it through, which is such a blessing in so many ways, even though the end result wasn't exactly what we hoped for. Mr. Crouse has an extensive background, which allows him to see and approach things differently, resulting in someone you simply will feel confident to let take the lead.
-- I have had over half a dozen attorneys in the last 10 years, they were some excellent attorneys as well, but when the alignment is off things can get wonky.  Mr. Crouse will know your case, he will take the time to listen and then explain strategically and why. -- that alone is a rare trait to find, so if you find yourself in need, Crouse law office will surely match you with someone who will do this for you too.
The law firm is great and Norann is amazing. Couldn’t have asked for anyone better to help me. I recommend this firm and her specifically to anyone dealing with family law issues 😁😁
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-star rating, Kendra! We are glad to help you process your documents. We value our clients, and we are happy that you are satisfied with our service. Have a great day!

reviews.text: I cannot say enough positive things about David Crouse and Associates.  We were fortunate enough to retain Mr. Crouse's services several years ago, and he has fought tooth and nail for us in ongoing custody issues and parenting plan modifications, both major and minor. Mr. Course handled each and every dispute with the same professionalism and compassion as he did when he handled the big stuff in the beginning, and never once did we feel like our issues didn't matter to him. He dotted every 'i' and crossed every 't' and even after my case was fully resolved, I can still see the benefits of hiring such an excellent attorney. If you want the cheapest lawyer out there, trust me when I say you get what you pay for. Mr. Crouse is not the least expensive attorney in Spokane, but considering the caliber of attorney you are getting, he is worth every damned penny. My sincerest thank you to David Crouse and Associates for making me feel like my family matters as much to you as they do to me.

We hired Alison to draft and finalize our wills and our advance directives.  Alison was complete in her preparation and asked the questions necessary to thoroughly guide our decision and drafting process.  She effectively guided us through all the steps necessary to complete this sometimes difficult task with confidence and peace of mind.

My first experience with Crouse Erickson was with Dalton Reynolds. Dalton came to my hearing unprepared and spent most of his time being told by the commissioner that he had not correctly followed procedure. For the second hearing, I called and called for days and was finally told a couple days before the hearing that Dalton was "not cut out for family law" and was no longer with the firm. David Crouse took over, charged a higher amount, and spent a long time on the phone telling long winded stories and charging me for them. Then they passed my case to Robert Wright, and to his credit, he worked my case for several months before quitting. Alison Erickson took over.  She refused to meet with me to discuss strategy, lied to me about whether she was negotiating with opposing council, lied to me about whether she had forgotten to send something on my behalf, and dropped me the second I expressed dissatisfaction with her firm's performance (right after sending a letter threatening to drop me if my retainer balance ever dropped below $3000). That was over a month ago, and they have not returned my retainer balance to me and now Alison is claiming not to know what I'm talking about. These people are an unprofessional mess. I switched to Northwest Family Law and immediately started getting results.
Edit: the firm did eventually return the retainer.

Alison Erickson was wonderful to work with. She was highly responsive, professional and knowledgeable.  From the moment I met with her to discuss the details of my case, I knew I was in good hands.  I highly recommend!

reviews.ownerResponse: At Legacy Law Group we believe in offering a complimentary initial consult for probate services -- a time for us to listen, let you ask questions about the law and procedure, let us discuss the particular legal services we provide, and also to explain our billing practices (details that are included in a signed engagement letter before any monies are paid). At such time we state that we do not offer or provide litigation services in contested matters -- but that we will, if necessary, refer such matters to other legal providers we believe to be ethical and well-equipped to handle such matters.  More than two years ago, and (as you write) “due to excessive family calls and drama …” and especially because your case involved the kind of litigation we do not provide, we properly referred you to others who do such work. So, while it is disappointing to read your negative review, we respect it is your right to post it -- even though more than two years have passed and you never gave us the opportunity to address your dissatisfactions with us privately.

reviews.text: Time management seemed to be one of his greatest downfalls, did not seem to have studied my daughter's cases before hand, he was hired to defend  a client, showing up for court, very unorganized and unprepared..Overly direct with client at one point, meeting in his office to pay him, handing him $5000 to take the case, he decided to be overly direct to the point of being down right rude to her.. Partovi law sent me to amazing outstanding warriors, They took turns knocking down every false lie accusations pretty much squashing it at any angle, Thanks in special part to ASHLEY who still to this day wants to see me flourish and happy.

I was surprised and pleasured to have a lawyer who worked with both sides. Kelsey, our new Paralegal was the most kind, polite, and genuine person to work with. We hit a ton of road blocks with people and issues in our adoption process, but she helped as much as she could and while I did what I could, it made the process move forward smoothly as possible! I'm so happy Mr. Partovi took this case because he made our family feel complete with my husband becoming my son's true father, as he has been calling him for years! Blood doesn't make a Father, and thank you Partovi, Kelsey, and everyone who made it my son's dream come true! If you need a team that Cares, Transparent, and Works with you, look no further! I will be referring all who needs help to Partovi!
Simply the best. Highly recommend David Partovi.

The worst lawyer in the World his useless defense ruined the future or an 18 years old boy and on top of that l pay him for it... he only tales to you very Kindle and he líes sayin that he did everthing he could to help.
I have not Personally utilized their services in court, but they were willing to answer questions and point me in a direction which I am very grateful for.
David partovi is awesome he gave me really good information and advice on what to do with my divorce. I also like the fact that that he is straightforward with everything
David Partovi helped me with a legal matter in which I was being falsely accused.  He was professional, kind, and very responsive when I contacted him.  I would definitely recommend!

My attorneys and paralegal became part of my family as they walked me through the worst experience in my life. Always very professional, caring and understanding, willing to listen and push me in the right direction. I would highly recommend them to everyone.

I was looking for the top rated child custody lawyer for a case I had, it was after hours and was shocked when I got an immediate call back and had an appointment set. I was prepared to put down a retainer only to find out after my consultation I didn’t need one, I got all my questions answered and they even sent over paperwork I could file in the court with no cost to me. I will definitely come back if I ever need an attorney as they are amazing, and easy to work with. Thank you again

We had a great experience working with Jodi.  Her knowledge and advice were very beneficial to our adoption process and we couldn’t be more pleased with the outcome!  Thanks to Jodi for her professionalism and caring attitude through the process.

Stellar service from Jodi is always received. She is thorough in providing the strongest contracts for 2nd parent adoption and known donors.  Best of all you leave feeling like you have a friend for life, and someone who will be a champion for your family.  We have been eager to recommend her to friends and family, and in turn they too always have the strongest accolades to share. I highly reccomend.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the kind words. The greatest compliment is a referral. Hope you're all doing well.

reviews.text:
Jodi helped my wife legally adopt our daughter. Jodi made the process smooth and simple, and we are so, so glad that she helped us with the adoption! Going into it we were concerned with how many moving pieces it takes for an adoption, and Jodi made sure it was a simple process for us. Not only was her service affordable, her timeliness and support was well, well worth it. We had a very unique situation and we thought it would  be a stressful process with lots of hoops to jump through, and Jodi walked us through the process in a simple and straight-forward way.
We cannot recommend her enough and are so, so very blessed to have her help us with the adoption!
Very polite receptionist

Jodi was phenomenal throughout our entire adoption process. There were several times we had questions for Jodi and she was always made us a priority and was quick to respond. We had a lot of negotiating back and forth with our open adoption agreement, but Jodi made it work for all parties and even worked off hours to make it happen. She truly went the extra mile. She is experienced, professional, and personable. I am so thankful for the role she played in our lives.
Very friendly and helpful. And the best part is they were willing to work with us on payment!! Thank you for all your help and support Jodi!
Jodi did my grandsons adoption & she couldn't have been nicer! She's the best!!
Jodi assisted us with a private infant adoption and we would highly highly recommended her to anyone. She was kind, professional, very responsive, and really great to work with.
I know Jodi personally. She is kind, competent and ethical. This is an attorney to be trusted.

She is amazing! She kept it very factual and straight forward. She was able to get my step parent adoption done in 6 weeks. I had waited 8.5 years of not seeing my ex to do our step parent adoption. I was terrified of what the consequences would be if he fought it. She kept it very professional, giving up updates as they came and was able to get the whole process, start to finish, done in 6 weeks. She really knows what she is doing. I highly recommend her!
Kind and quick service!

I feel confident with this team. I've consulted with several lawyers, but Quiroga Law was the first to agree to help me, and I feel secure in their support. Attorney Juliana C. Alejandra and Attorney Maria have made me feel safe and confident, but the entire team is incredibly kind when I visit their office in person.
Excellent work from Juliana Castano
Thank you, lawyers Hector Quiroga and Maria Quiroga and their team. I am Maria, Alexa Gutierrez's mother.
Not professional at all, take 50$  for 5 min for  construction and don't answer any  my questions.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Our office takes pride in offering professional and transparent legal guidance. To ensure accuracy, we must collect some basic information before providing a quote or legal opinion. You didn't feel comfortable sharing any details about the case and wanted to verify our office. Without reviewing a case, it’s not viable to give a reliable estimate — especially given the frequent changes and complexities in immigration under the current administration.

We completely understand your hesitation and would be happy to meet with you in person to verify our office and discuss your mother’s case directly. Please feel free to contact us to schedule an in-person consultation. As it was explained to you at the time of making the appointment, the appointment is free, the $50 fee is a security deposit to protect our staff's time and ensure you come to the appointment. It was refunded to you and it does take a few business days to show up in your bank account.

reviews.text: The service provided was consistently unsatisfactory and is not recommended. I experienced significant delays and communication issues, including unanswered calls and frequent voicemail. (I would call using an alternative telephone number, and the recipient would respond.)Furthermore, I was subjected to repeated requests for document resubmission and a lack of progress updates. I was informed that the assigned case work was no longer with the firm and was subsequently assigned to another caseworker. A month later I was informed my 2nd case worker Diana Rivas, had done nothing with my case, there was zero progress established. I am now on my 3rd case worker. I was also given inaccurate and misleading information regarding the DACA process. This firm is not recommended for immigration legal advice, as they are unable to deliver the services paid for!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Joseph,

Thank you for your feedback. Some of the information in your review is not accurate. Our team has presented several options regarding the DACA case, but the choice was not to proceed with them.

As you may know, the DACA program has been subject to ongoing changes due to court decisions, executive orders, and continuing litigation. These shifts can create understandable confusion, and our goal has always been to keep you informed as those legal developments occur.

We’re sorry to hear that you’re dissatisfied, and we’d like the opportunity to make things right by you. Please contact our office directly, either by phone or through your client portal, so we can review your situation and address your concerns regarding new DACA petitions.

reviews.text: The Quiroga Law Firm guided us step-by-step through our immigration process from day one. Their team was always attentive to our questions. Many thanks to Natalia for the excellent work she did with us. They exceeded my expectations and kept me informed of every aspect of my case. Do not hesitate to seek professional help with any immigration matter. I highly recommend the Quiroga Law Firm.

Hello, good afternoon! I'd like to give a very good reference for Mr. Nestor Uribe. He's excellent at his job as a manager and case advisor. He's truly a hard worker and very capable in everything he does. I highly recommend him to everyone, and he can help you with any questions you may have about your cases. I hope he continues to grow as a person because he deserves it. God bless him and may he continue to succeed! 👍👍👍👍

I'm happy I started my U visa process. They are attentive, the initial fees are reasonable, they are very understanding, and above all, they have a human touch and are helping me throughout the process. Angie Zapata, one of their collaborators, is very helpful.
Best lawyer ever. Highly recommend
The entire team at Quiroga Law Office is friendly and keeps you informed about your case.
David Barbosa is great! Appreciate how helpful he is.

I am grateful and satisfied to have found Quiroga Office, because they supported me every step of the way and are always very attentive to all the changes one experiences in the process. Thank you very much, great work Cinthia Ayala and we are all satisfied with your work, thank you!
They so nice and very helpful. Thank you so much. Maria Sarmiento Is very friendly, She responds very quickly when I need her help.
I am very grateful to the team at Quiroga Law Office, especially to my representative in the U visa process, Mr. Alejandro Arango.

Magali and my husband would like to thank Alejandro Arango and the attorneys at Quiroga Law for their excellent service and dedication in handling my case. Thanks to them, we received our work permit very quickly. I highly recommend them. Thank you!

Hector Quiroga, thank you for handling my case. You always inspired confidence in me, and today I can confirm that you are the best. In less time than I expected, I received the best news. Thanks also to the lawyer (Alejandro Arango) who has always been very attentive to our case. Always available for any questions, very professional. Thank you, and God bless you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your message, Maria. We're delighted to hear that your experience with Hector was so positive. At Quiroga Law Office, we always strive to provide the best service to our clients. Best regards.

They helped me get my work permit, and I was able to go to Mexico to see my mother-in-law, who is now of legal age and wanted to see us! Ms. Sandra C. is very attentive to my case. Great service. Daniel Castro has been of so much help when it comes to getting an answer to a question. Well organized and always got a response the day of or the next day when sending an email. I do recommend this office for immigration legal services.

reviews.text: My husband and I had a situation occur while we were traveling that required legal assistance that was somewhat urgent. Terry was not only helpful with the paperwork but also found a traveling Notary Public to meet us where we were to get the papers signed, sealed and sent to Terry. He has been most helpful with answering our questions, going over paperwork with us to make sure we understood everything, and if something came up that was out of his area of expertise he gave us names and numbers of people he knew would be able to help. Terry’s kindness, integrity and expertise has been not only a Godsend but greatly appreciated and we will definitely use his services again.
The rudeness, and outright audacity to treat a potential client was the worst experience of my life so far. Do not inquire about returning his services. Not capable of handling the work load.

My wife and I utilized Terry Gobel's services to update our estate planning.  We recently moved to Washington state and wanted to make sure our family was set up for a community property state as well as refresh our ideas around what would be the best estate planning for us.  Terry made the process very easy and worked on our timeline. He was very responsive and gave us great ideas that he has learned from his many years of service. He would certainly be the lawyer we would refer our friends and family to in the future.

Words cannot express how incredible our experience with the Gobel Law office has been.

Attorney Gobel stayed with our situation for 20 years!!! My wife and I had completely given up on any hope of restitution from the offending parties but our amazing attorney NEVER gave up and now after two decades justice has been served.

One a one to five star rating, I give the Gobel Law firm a 50!!
Mr. Gobel was kind, practical and generous with his time.

I Highly recommend Gobel Law Office! Terry and his staff are so kind, professional and quick responding. They treat u like family. I am, so thankful I was able to find this firm. If u need a professional with the experience and knowledge. Look no further.
Thank u So much Terry!

My father has recently passed and my wife and I were not sure if we needed a probate lawyer. Mr. Gobel was recommended by Rich Byers. He sat with us and reviewed our paperwork and discussed all our options and was very honest with us. He explained that we didn't need his services because my father had setup his estate so no probate was necessary.
He has the highest values and integrity and is very kind. Even though we didn't need his services we wanted everyone to know what a quality law office and lawyer he is.
Thanks so much for your time Scott Mericle

Five Stars!  My Grandma passed away June of 2024 (she was almost 99).  She wasn't well off financially but did own a small home with mortgage.  My sister and I began looking for a probate lawyer in Spokane WA.  According to Google and both of our research Terry was the best in Spokane.  Terry and his paralegal Mary, were better than I could have hoped for.  I am extremely glad that I hired Terry.
The whole process was more complicated than I was thinking it would be, Terry and Mary were able to walk me through everything while handling all the difficult processes themselves.  We had a few hiccups with my grandmas will early on but Terry was able to get it worked out in no time.  Hiring Terry is definitely worth the money, it made the whole process run a lot smoother with him on my team.
Terry is a man of integrity and does things by the book,  He was able to get creative and scrappy when he needs to (A couple bills that were disputed).
The peace of mind I had after hiring Terry made this already stressful time go much smoother.
My mom has Dementia and I was her power of attorney but not her payee representative.  Terry explained the difference and referred me to another excellent attorney who was able to help get everything fixed properly.
They are full of experience and wisdom, Terry Gobel is the guy I would pick if you want things done the right way but also want the best outcome possible.

Eric Gonser
Very caring & wiling to go the extra mile to find me help! Thank you Terry

I had a brief but very beneficial encounter with Terry Gobel. Terry quickly responded to my email request for help collecting a judgement. He gave me a couple options, including referring me to someone else. Great experience and exceptional level of service.
Unable to take my case due to statute limitations. But was highly empathetic and helped me understand why I had to eat the injustice for which I was seeking counsel.

Terry was amazing with the service provided for my daughter's adoption he did the unthinkable because he worked with the exterior laws to be able to help me he was there all the time with me and did an amazing work, thank you Terry

After a horrible experience with Spokane lawyers while trying to respond to a divorce filing from another state, the bar site recommended Terry and I wished I had found him two years before! He listened and provided the type of to the point, competent legal advice I am accustomed to in corporate law and other markets. If you get the chance to work with him, jump at it. He is a gem in what has been a dark market.

I have had the privilege of knowing Attorney Terry Gobel, and I can confidently say that he is one of the most compassionate, knowledgeable, and humble professionals I have ever met. His dedication to his work goes beyond legal representation—he truly cares about people .

Beyond his professional excellence, Terry is also a mentor I deeply admire him, both personally and spiritually. His wisdom, integrity, and unwavering commitment to helping others have had a profound impact on my life. He leads by example, demonstrating the values of honesty, service, and dedication in all aspects of his work.

If you are looking for an attorney who not only excels in the legal field but also genuinely cares about people, Terry Gobel is the one to trust without hesitation.

I had some issues regarding a civil litigation case & Terry was extremely help with the entire process. This was my first time dealing with a case like this & Terry stuck by my side & was not only honest & compassionate, but made me feel confident throughout the entire experience. I highly recommend Gobel Law Office over everything.

Fantastically friendly and knowledgeable.  I had a question regarding a judgement lien and Mr. Gobel walked through steps necessary to record the lien.  His advice was comprehensive and clear and much appreciated by me.  Recommend
Excellent first class service!! Highly recommend knew exactly how to deal with my issues in a highly professional manner. Very courteous and extremely  knowledgeable. Thank you so much!

I recently hired Mr. Gobel to help me with an issue I had with a contractor.  His was very professional and a good listener.  He asked valid questions and affirmed my concerns.  After consulting with him, he did let me know that I had a case and outlined the steps that we needed to take to address my concerns.  He helped me navigate through each and every step and maintained good communication via email and phone calls.  I was extremely pleased with what he did for me and very grateful that he was my attorney and representing me.  I highly recommend Terry Gobel.

Terry took the time to walk me through some legal options. The outcome was not what I had hoped for. Still Terry saved me money and time with the advice he shared. I feel confident in my path forward now.

My situation seemed daunting, but it was quickly resolved by Gobel Law Office! Things were handled quickly and professionally. Hope I don't need their services again, but I know where I'll go if I do!

I found Gobel Law Office after googling “Honest lawyer in Spokane”.  Gobel came up first, and with good reason.  Mary in the office is so friendly and helpful. Mr. Gobel is delightful. Another law firm had just drawn up a simple last will and testament for me.  After several thousand dollars and a pile of paper work that no one person (including lawyers)  were able to make any sense out of … I turned to Gobel’s Office for help and resolution.

They were AWESOME.  They provided me with a clear and simple document that more than met my needs.  Mr. Gobel was personable and very thoughtful in creating a perfect plan for me. He is very knowledgeable and thinks of EVERYTHING.

I highly recommend the Gobel Law Office for any of your needs.  You will find that each situation is designed with your specific needs in mind.  I can’t say enough about how much I appreciate being able to work with this firm.  I lucked out with Google. You will not regret choosing them.  They treat you like family.

Thank you Mary and Mr. Gobel.  You did such a great job and made it so stress free!  I appreciate you both!
Terry is a quality attorney who cares deeply for his clients.  I have had the pleasure of working with him for roughly two decades.  You cannot find a better advocate or person.

Approximately a year and a half ago. I was in the throes of an unforseen and unsolicited divorce. Today, I am here to say, "Thank You". Terry, your honesty, wisdom, candor, and compassion will never be forgotten. Your intuitive guidance and stalwart support helped walk me through a very painful time of chaos and grief. I am grateful for your selfless service and professional intuition - a true Godsend. Thank you, Sir. Hold Fast-

I would recommend this Law firm a million times over!! I was needing legal advice during the time of a death in the family. I called 28 numbers and couldn’t get someone on the phone for longer than 2 minutes to even hear my concerns. When I called Gobel Law Office I spoke with a paralegal named Mary who was kind and compassionate to my situation, while also being extremely detailed with my information. I heard back from Terry within an hour and he provided me sound legal advice when I really needed it. He assisted me free of charge with my next steps out of his own kindness, and offered legal services when the time comes. I wish this had been my first call of the day!

Mr. Gobel responded to my call with the knowledge I needed to make an objective decision for my situation. He was professional, personal, and show compasion for me and my family. Thank you, Mr. Gobel!

I highly recommend Gobel Law Office. Terry Gobel and his paralegal Mary were irreplaceable during my family law matter. They are thorough, professional, compassionate, and immensely knowledgeable. For any future legal matters, I will first seek out Terry for his expertise.

Not only is Mr. Gobel kind and compassionate, he knows his way around court. I hired him to help get a protection order, and he was genuinely caring and made the situation less stressful. He offered ways to minimize costs, gave recommendations, and helped edit personal statements.

His experience was shown in the courtroom, with people, and with opposing side paperwork and he was surprisingly insightful and accurate. He explained court procedures and answered all of my questions. I will return to him for future needs and will continue to recommend Terry D. Gobel, attorney in Spokane.

Fabulous law office! Mr. Gobel helped me through my difficult divorce process and is a great attorney to work with. From our first conversation he listened to my concerns and supported me every step of the way. Mr. Gobel and his paralegal, Ms. Mary were always very responsive when I had questions outside of our meetings. I'm very much grateful and cannot thank them enough for everything they did for me. I highly recommend and would work with this law office again. Thanks, team!

Gobel has represented me through several very tough family legal matters His office walked me through everything, explaining what would happen and what different things meant. He reassured me throughout the process when I felt overwhelmed. I could not have asked for better representation. His knowledge, expertise, and commitment ensured a positive outcome for my case.
The most help I received after calling all over for legal help. He went above and beyond to try and help me. Couldn't be more thankful.

My wife and I were in need of legal representation for a protection order/harassment case. We were given Terry’s name from a friend and we could not be happier with him. From prompt and professional communication to competent, ethical and seasoned argumentation during our docket call and hearing, Terry and his fantastic paralegal, Mary, were an amazing team.

Our case ended up being much more complicated than we could have imagined. Because of the complexity of our situation we’ve been at the courthouse half a dozen times and seen probably 20 attorneys in action and there’s no one else we would rather have to represent us. I highly recommend him.

Our family had a fantastic experience with Terry Gobel. He had a perfect understanding of what we needed and had the documents drawn up within a few days. Knowledgeable, Great Communication, Excellent Service, Absolutely Recommend.

Terry represented me on a very complicated probate case.  The case took a little under a year, I had contacted many other probate offices in Spokane who turned me down the first phone call. Terry was the 2nd one who was wiling to meet and go over the case. He agreed to take it on. I wouldn't have gotten through the last year without him. He believed in me and helped me more than he will probably ever know. I got to know Terry and Mary very well over the last year, spending hours in their office preparing for mediation, going through mediation, and more. He's always been quick to respond, listened to my concerns, saw my side of things, and the most important thing was understanding my background and where I was coming from, but still providing the view from a legal aspect and how things would look in court. I will never be able to thank him and Mary enough for getting me through the last year. This is the lawyer you need - if you are looking for someone.
Working with Terry Gobel was a pleasure. He was very professional, responsive and communicative. I would recommend Terry for your estate work.
reviews.authorName: Real Estate Marketplace NW Inc Office

reviews.text:
Terry recently helped me with a couple of legal issues that I had been meaning to deal with for quite a while but had put off because they were daunting to me.

Terry was kind, considerate and patient, and made sure I had enough information to make the right choices.

I came away wishing I had taken care of this months ago, the process was painless.

He deserves all the five star ratings and can’t recommend him enough!

Terry was knowledgeable, professional and considerate every time he met with my family concerning a probate case we had him handle for us. His paralegal Mary was also a pleasure and tremendously helpful. I would recommend Gobel law office to anyone going through a probate or in need of other legal services they provide.
Terry was an amazing help for my family. He was always available when we needed him and made this process very easy for us. I highly recommend him for any of your legal needs.

Terry took a legal need that I considered to be complex and simplified it in a way that I could understand. I was able to follow the process and have the confidence that this is the most reliable, lawful and accurate legal work I have had completed for my family.

Terry Gobel prepared our estate will. He is an excellent attorney. He is professional, knowledgeable, communicates well to explain the options, and makes recommendations with integrity. His secretary is also very courteous and helpful. His rates are very reasonable. If we need an attorney in the future, we will again choose Terry Gobel.
Exceptional from the mundane to the sticky wicket legal mazes. I've had the opportunity to work with Terry several times and am grateful for his ability, experience, and insight. Highly recommend!

Really appreciated Terry's expertise.  He translated the legalese in some documents into terms my family could understand.  He then educated us on our options including the pros and cons of each.  We definitely felt more equipped to make the final decisions in settling my sister's estate.

Mr. GOBEL saw that the contract was sound BUT that there was a legal aspect I was unaware of and that of a “statute of limitations”.  Wasn’t what I wanted to here, but kept me from chasing after something I was not going to be successful in collections.

Thanks Terry for saving me needless legal expenses for your painful, but necessary advice.

I had a really straightforward custody case. I only had a few conversations via phone and some emails. Then pre trial and trial date. After the court date, I was called and told “yay, we got what you wanted and we will close out your case and finish invoicing”. After two weeks of no contact from them I reached out because I hadn’t used even half of my retainer per my last invoice prior to
court nor had I received any final paperwork. I received an email back that they couldn’t send me anything and it was because they left out the ‘r’ in my name in my email address.  I was eventually sent pdf’s of final paperwork. Still nothing about my retainer. I had to reach out again asking about final invoice a week later (3 week past my final court date) I received an invoice that I owed money. I was charge $80 for the 5 min phone call after my final court date congratulating me plus all kinds of other Miscellaneous charges after the final court date, including the emails I sent questioning my whereabouts of my paperwork and invoices. I have called several times but I never get a response. I would say take service elsewhere. I had to send taxes, paystubs several times to several people, was charged for those emails. I was told my MetLife legal service didn’t cover custody but then was told by someone on the phone I was a MetLife so they didn’t know why I paid a retainer. It just all around confusing and there’s no transparency.
Total dismissive and basically as cold and uncompassionate as you could imagine. What a waste of time .

All of my attorneys and paralegals were friendly, informative, understanding and professional. I was always able to reach someone for any questions I had and they made the process as easy as possible under the circumstances.
Knowledgeable and informative.  Very helpful and easy to work with.

What an amazing team! Jonas and Malia took such good care of me and helped me finish up my husbands very messy probate since he didn't have a will. They were knowledgeable, helpful, responsive and just amazing. I've worked with other probate lawyers in this area and I can truly say working with this team was a blessing.

I’ve reached out to Gravis Law PLLC in Spokane multiple times and unfortunately, I’ve yet to receive any meaningful assistance. Each time I call, I’m told there are no attorneys available—and no indication of when, or if, they’ll be accepting new cases.

When I spoke with Marvin, he had no information to offer and simply said “until further notice,” which didn’t help at all. It’s disappointing that a law office consistently lacks follow-through, customer service, and any real guidance.

I was hopeful for support and transparency, but the experience has been frustrating and unproductive.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're sorry to hear your expectations were not met. Unfortunately, when we have attorneys with a season of a full case load and inability to accept a new matter, it is not always easy to ascertain exactly when the attorney will be ready to meet with a potential new client. That can depend on several factors, including matters settling early, matters not settling and requiring a more complex strategy, and other things we are not always able to foresee. The transparency comes in the form of honesty that we will not commit to helping a client if we do not have the capacity to do our very best for them. We would be happy to try to provide a referral to a local attorney if we are able - please contact our Chief Growth Officer Randi Johnson at RJohnson@gravislaw.com

reviews.text: I reached out to set an appointment the person doing the phone calls tried to tell me because my son is a minor a POA is not necessary but had no knowledge about Washington laws and how a child that is 13 has to provide consent for anyone to be involved in their medical care and are able to make their own medical decisions. Then he wanted my card information over the phone before making an appointment for 100 dollars with no proof of it being a potential scam and said there was no option even when I stated that I was willing to pay in person or at the consultation. The person on the phone was upset even after I explained he sounds more like a scam without having any knowledge on the subject for the state we are in.
reviews.ownerResponse: Danielle, we're sorry to hear your experience did not meet your expectations. Our New Client Communications Team is not a scam. Some of our attorney consultations do come with a pre-appointment fee to reserve the time for you on the attorney's calendar. It is not a scam; it's just a consultation fee. Happy to discuss further if you're still interested: Randi Johnson, Chief Growth Officer RJohnson@gravislaw.com.

I was in the process of setting up Escrow for one of my business listings. After corresponding by email with “Crystal Land,” an attorney, I was immediately impressed. Whenever I sent her an email, I would get a response within minutes.  This has never happened to me with the Escrow houses I have used here in the Seattle area. “Crystal” would send me updates as if she could read my mind. The whole transaction was questionable from the start. and now, it was going smoothly without a hitch and faster than I could have gotten it here in the Seattle area, over my 20 years in commercial and business opportunities.  I was amazed.  I have since told my staff.  We are starting the New Year off by sending all our closings to “Spokane Business Attorneys, Crystal Lamb.” If you decide to use Crystal, you will not be disappointed. Commercial/Business Opportunities.

reviews.text: Thank you to Twyford Law for their professional support in a divorce I did not see coming. As things unfolded, it became evident I needed legal advice to get through it, and Twyford Law was recommended. Thanks especially to Jillian Jorden who was kind, compassionate, and extremely knowledgeable. She was efficient and able to navigate a way through a complicated situation with clarity. She was able to break things down in a way that helped me get her the information needed as I was ready.  She did not give me false hopes. In the end she was able to negotiate a favorable and fair agreement without going to trial. Thank-you also to Elizabeth who patiently spent time with me gathering the information needed, answered all my questions as they arose and helped me stay calm. She was also very kind and knowledgeable in finances and organization. Both were professional and well prepared.  Thanks to the whole team, who were all personable and professional as well. I would highly recommend them.

Twyford Law truly takes the time to listen and understand you and your situation. They explain the legal process in a way that’s easy to understand, and they make you feel supported every step of the way.

They have genuine care for their clients and I wasn’t left feeling like I was just another case for them. They are responsive, thorough, and committed to getting the best possible outcome.

If you’re looking for a law firm that is both highly competent and compassionate, I would absolutely recommend Twyford Law.
I called to get information the office answered quickly and had really great advice for me going forward. I felt like they listened without judgment and truly cared about helping me.

Twyford was exactly what I needed to negotiate an acrimonious and painful divorce. They listened to my needs and responded to questions--even my rambling, emotional ones! Olivia was a rock, keeping me focused on my goals (my son) and helping to shield me from the absurdities of everyday life when negotiating the divorce. She fought hard to get me what we could, even in the face of a system that disadvantages dads, ensuring that our arguments were fair and effective while fighting back against "bulldog" attacks and unjust arguments.

I worked with Jillian Jordan and her paralegal Elizabeth at Twyford Law Office on a contested divorce that had some real complexity to it — including financial issues and a disputed committed intimate relationship claim. It wasn’t a simple case, and there were a lot of moving pieces.

Jillian was knowledgeable about Washington law and was straightforward with me about the strengths and risks in my position. She did the research I asked for, including digging into the CIR case law early on, and she was prepared to move toward trial if that became necessary. Elizabeth was organized, responsive, and helped keep everything moving behind the scenes.

Divorce is stressful and expensive no matter who you hire, but I can say the firm handled the procedural and legal side professionally and got the matter finalized. They were available when needed and worked through some challenging moments during the case.

I appreciate the work they put in and the effort to resolve everything cleanly at the end. I’d recommend Jillian and her team to anyone dealing with a complex family law matter in Washington.

I didn't feel understood or well represented by Twyford. My case was a sticky one, and this was my first time involved in a legal case. I wanted a lawyer that was willing to explain the process to me thoroughly. I wanted a lawyer that cared enough to pronounce my name correctly in front of the judge and my ex. That didn't happen. I was let down by Twyford Law Office.

Olivia handled my divorce case extremely well! Easy to work with, knowledgeable and very efficient! 10/10 would recommend! Alexis was a pleasure to work with as well and communicated everything very efficiently!
reviews.ownerResponse: Travis, Thank for the kind words. We loved working with you, and are happy with the results of your divorce case as well. We wish you the best of luck in the future

reviews.text: Without the help of Mark and Julie my entire life would have been in complete ruin. I am grateful for all the time and effort put forth to secure a great result on my case. Thank you..
reviews.ownerResponse: Zeb, you are very welcome. We are so happy we were able to secure such a great result on your case and ensure that you have a bright future. Thanks for the kind words.

reviews.text:
A great divorce attorney is talented at both financial and parenting issues, and Mark Cassell is fantastic at both. On the financial side, Mark helped negotiate a deal that was very beneficial to me without going to trial, which was an amazing feat since my ex-spouse was difficult at every turn. For me though, the final parenting plan and time with my children was the most important part of this process, and I couldn’t have found a better attorney for this aspect than Mark. My ex-spouse demanded a parenting trial, and Mark’s preparation and courtroom skills led to an overwhelming win at the trial!

Because I was constantly dealing with issues from a difficult ex-spouse, Mark was extremely patient with all my questions. Mark and the Twyford Team were always out-pacing my ex-spouse’s attorney. He would respond to my questions and issues on the weekends and late at night. He would take time out of his own family time to discuss issues with me after the kids had gone to bed. When an issue arose over a weekend that I had no idea how to handle, Mark took time out of his own weekend to guide me through the incident, which ultimately helped a great deal at trial. His quick responsiveness on issues led to beneficial outcomes so many times!

No one wants to go through this process, but if you have to, Mark Cassell is the attorney you want. I’ve recommended him to everyone I know going through this ordeal. He was kind, patient, and quick to respond, and he was also brilliant in the courtroom during all my hearings and the final trial. The next chapter of my life has been great, and I owe most of that to Mark and his team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Kayla, Thank you so much for taking the time to leave such a comprehensive review. We were so pleased with the result of your case as well. We appreciate you as a client and wish you the best in the future.

I called this law firm to see about representing my a case against large corporation. I made that crystal clear when at the beginning of my conversation that the opposing party was a large well-known corporation. The receptionist or legal assistant failed to tell me that there was a conflict of interest with the opposing at the beginning of our conversation. Instead, she asked what was going on. I explained my situation, then she proceeds to tell that they represent this large well-known corporation. The minute that I mentioned the large corporations name as the opposing party, she should have immediately known that they represented this large corporation and informed me at that point that they represented this large corporation and never should have asked me any of the details about my case. reviews.ownerResponse:
Because of confidentiality rules between clients and attorneys, I am unable to comment on whether an individual contacted my office for help, or not. However, I can respond in general terms to the information you posted.

Congratulations on being approved for benefits! I am glad to hear that you fought for your rights to these benefits. Social Security denials can leave people feeling like they should give up. But Social Security often denies qualified individuals initially, and it is important to keep fighting for benefits until you have had an opportunity talk with a judge about your case. This hearing is where you want to present your best case by connecting your story to acceptable medical source evidence in the file, cross examining medical or vocational witnesses that Social Security calls to testify, and collecting medical opinions from your providers that focus on the functional limitations you have.

When social security evaluates a claim for disability benefits, the rules vary depending upon the claimant’s age and past work experience. My firm conducts a thorough intake to discover issues involved in the case. We then have a conversation with the potential client about the facts of the case and how to overcome any issue we spotted. There is no fee for this service. Even when we decline to accept a case, we provide a reason for that decision and what steps a person can take to correct the issue(s) we spotted.

You are correct that there is not a mental requirement to get a lawyer to fight for your rights to disability payments. I also do not require a person to seek specific treatment providers or pursue a specific approach to their case. Instead, I do ask that people to stop suffering in silence if they are not receiving ongoing treatment for their disabling impairments. Social Security looks to recent medical examination findings to decide a case. Even when a judge wants to award disability payments to a person, there must be medical evidence to support the decision or else it may be overturned by the Appeals Council. When I evaluate a case and believe a person does not have enough recent medical treatment to support a favorable decision, I tell the person to get treatment and call me back. I am then very likely to take the case once there is current, ongoing medical treatment that I can point to and connect the dots of what a person says about why they cannot work with evidence social security accepts. If you did contact my office about your case, I hope the information I would have provided would have helped you to better support your claim for disability benefits.

Wishing you the best,
Eric Penar

reviews.text: Was not only late to meet with the judge, but when I was awarded $329 a month I was appalled.I did not get fought for because I was a stay at home mom...
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry to hear that you have had a bad experience with Social Security. Because of confidentiality rules between clients and attorneys, I am unable to comment on specific cases or whether an individual was a client at all. However, I can respond in general terms to the information you posted.

First, and most importantly, I have never been late to a hearing with a judge. While it is possible that an unforeseen circumstance could occur in the future that would cause me to be late to a hearing, this has never happened to me. I take steps to avoid being late by planning to arrive at hearings 20-30 minutes before they are scheduled to begin. I tell my clients to do the same. This plan allows us to arrive in time for a hearing even if an unforeseen circumstance occurs. This also provides time to talk about any last-minute questions a client may have. I conduct pre-hearing conferences the day before a hearing, which typically last more than an hour, so that we can cover all the issues and answer all the questions a client has. Arriving early allows us to talk about any additional questions or concerns that come up.

Finally, I am sorry that you were awarded a low monthly benefit. These benefits are based upon what an individual paid into Social Security when they were working, and whether they meet income and resource rules to qualify for SSI payments. I am also appalled by how these rules work, especially when it comes to stay-at-home parents. I agree that pressure should be applied to the federal government to update these rules. But the monthly payments a person receives does not reflect how hard their representative fought for them in their case. To the contrary, my fees are based on a percentage of what a person is awarded in past-due benefits. So, if a person receives less benefits, they pay a less in legal fees.

Please contact me about your situation. While I cannot change what you were awarded in social security payments, I can work with you to discover whether you may be eligible for other programs. Examples would be benefits based on the earnings record of an ex-spouse or recently deceased spouse, benefits based upon a union contract, or benefits based upon a private insurance policy you paid for. I wish the best for you.

-Eric Penar

Spero Law did an incredible job with my wife's case. Esther and Beatriz really took a lot of the stress out of the immigration process and guided us throughout our Adjustment of Status journey. Compared to previous legal help we had sought out, our experience at Spero really set the bar for how client-attorney relationships should feel. We cannot recommend this firm enough.

Our experience at Spero Law Firm, PLLC, has been nothing short of spectacular. Their friendly and proactive communication made us feel welcomed immediately. After 19 long years of trying to resolve my immigration case, and after working with three different attorneys, I can finally say that Esther made the magic happen. Where three other attorneys could not, she succeeded, and for that I will be forever grateful.
From the very beginning, she held my hand before, during, and after the entire process. With frequent calls, emails day and night, and Zoom meetings, I was never left confused, unheard, or unsupported. Her guidance was steady, her communication was clear, and her reassurance meant more than words can express during such an emotional journey.
Her professionalism, industriousness, and deep knowledge of immigration law are exceptional, but what truly sets her apart is her kind heart and humanity. She goes far beyond what you expect from an attorney, she genuinely cares. She treated my case as if it were her own, with compassion, patience, and respect at every step. Both Beatriz and Esther made me feel like family, always welcoming, reassuring, quick feedback and a listening ear where I got all my questions answered.
She was worth far more than every dime spent, and I am beyond thankful to have had her as my attorney. I truly feel blessed to have found her, and I pray that many more blessings continue to come her way. I am incredibly fortunate to have worked with her, though I still wish I had met her much earlier.
No words can truly express my gratitude. From the bottom of my heart, I am thankful again and again and again…

I had another lawyer for two years, and when we turned to her, it turned out that someone voted for me. My husband and I were shocked. When I turned to the old lawyer, she waved her hands and said only for money, but did not try to do anything. Then I found Esther through the Internet, we met very quickly and she proposed a plan and we started to act. She was open and that lawyer in whom the vein of justice flows and her professional vein was immediately felt, this struggle for the client was felt, that she does not give up and will not abandon the client. (There is so little of this in lawyers). I believe that the most important thing for lawyers is to fight for the client's rights.
State institutions did not help us, rather they did everything so that we could not do anything. It is very difficult to prove that you did not vote and it is a violation of the law, which even you did not violate, but the system said that you did. I was in despair and depression, but Esther calmed me down and told us what to do and did a lot herself. When we collected the entire package of documents and all possible evidence that I did not do this, and then we applied for citizenship. And this happened, I thank Esther and that immigration officer for believing in our evidence base. I have tears in my eyes from joy when I remember what we went through. A huge thank you to Esther and the team at Spero Law Firm for the fight, we did it. Justice is with the Spero Law Firm.💪👏🎉🎉🎉

I had been trying to obtain my residency through three law firms in Denver, CO and Grand Junction, CO for 18 long years without a positive response, but I did spend thousands of dollars. When I met Attorney Esther Olivares, we had two Zoom interviews and then an in-person one. I gave her all the required documentation, and three months later I received an appointment for the biometrics processing stamp. Thirteen months later, I had my appointment in Denver, CO. I went to the Department of Homeland Security for the final interview, and four months later I obtained my long-awaited Permanent Resident Card from the USA. I am very, very grateful and can highly recommend them for their professionalism, knowledge of the laws, and great efficiency in their work.
